title: Delta-JEPA: Learning Action-Sensitive World Models via Latent Difference Decoding
summary: Learning visual world models for planning requires compact latent dynamics that remain sensitive to actions, yet reconstruction-free joint-embedding objectives can collapse to action-insensitive representations. We propose Delta-JEPA, an end-to-end reconstruction-free world model that augments latent forward prediction with a Latent Difference Action Decoder (LDAD). Unlike inverse decoders that infer actions from concatenated endpoint embeddings, LDAD reconstructs the executed action from the latent displacement between consecutive observations. This displacement-level supervision directly regularizes transition geometry: adjacent embeddings cannot collapse without losing action information, and different actions are encouraged to induce distinguishable latent changes for rollout-based planning. Delta-JEPA uses only latent prediction and action reconstruction, avoiding pixel reconstruction and distribution-matching regularizers. Across four visual continuous-control tasks, Delta-JEPA improves planning over JEPA-based and representation-learning world model baselines. Ablations show that displacement-based action decoding is consistently more effective than endpoint concatenation, and action-sensitivity analyses show clearer action-conditioned latent responses. These results indicate that supervising latent differences is a simple and effective mechanism for collapse-resistant and action-sensitive world model learning.

AI.tldr: 提出Delta-JEPA，通过潜在位移解码动作实现抗坍缩的动作敏感世界模型。
AI.translated_summary: 学习用于规划的视觉世界模型需要紧凑的潜在动力学，且其对动作保持敏感，然而无重建的联合嵌入目标可能会坍缩为对动作不敏感的表示。我们提出Delta-JEPA，一种端到端的无重建世界模型，通过潜在差异动作解码器（LDAD）增强潜在前向预测。与从拼接的端点嵌入推断动作的逆解码器不同，LDAD从连续观测之间的潜在位移中重建执行的动作。这种位移级别的监督直接正则化转移几何：相邻嵌入无法在不丢失动作信息的情况下坍缩，且不同的动作被鼓励产生可区分的潜在变化以用于基于展开的规划。Delta-JEPA仅使用潜在预测和动作重建，避免了像素重建和分布匹配正则化器。在四个视觉连续控制任务中，Delta-JEPA相比基于JEPA的和表示学习世界模型基线改进了规划。消融实验表明，基于位移的动作解码始终比端点拼接更有效，动作敏感性分析显示了更清晰的动作条件潜在响应。这些结果表明，监督潜在差异是一种简单且有效的机制，可用于抗坍缩和动作敏感的世界模型学习。
AI.research_problem: 无重建的联合嵌入世界模型中，潜在表示容易坍缩为对动作不敏感的表示，导致基于展开的规划失效。
AI.key_innovation: 提出潜在差异动作解码器（LDAD），从连续观测之间的潜在位移重建执行的动作，直接正则化转移几何以防止表示坍缩并保持动作敏感性。
AI.motivation: 视觉世界模型需要紧凑且动作敏感的潜在动力学，但无重建的联合嵌入目标会导致表示坍缩，丧失动作敏感性，影响规划效果。
AI.method: Delta-JEPA在潜在前向预测基础上增加LDAD模块，从连续观测的潜在位移重建动作，仅使用潜在预测和动作重建，不依赖像素重建或分布匹配正则化器。
AI.experiments: 在四个视觉连续控制任务上与基于JEPA的和表示学习世界模型基线对比评估，并进行了消融实验和动作敏感性分析。
AI.result: Delta-JEPA在规划性能上优于基线；消融实验显示位移级动作解码一致优于端点拼接；动作敏感性分析显示更清晰的动作条件潜在响应。
AI.conclusion: 监督潜在差异是一种简单有效的机制，能够实现抗坍缩和动作敏感的世界模型学习。

title: Weak Dominant Balance for Robust Identification of Dynamically Consistent Fluid Flow Structure
summary: Extracting interpretable, localized physical mechanisms from complex spatiotemporal data is a foundational challenge across physics, biology, and engineering, but has remained out of reach on real measurements. The central obstacle is obtaining high-quality gradients of data via numerical differentiation, which amplifies noise, diverges for high-order equations, and falters on irregular geometries, limiting the scope of existing approaches to clean simulations of low-order systems. Here, we present weak dominant balance, a derivative-free framework that projects governing equations into a weak (integral) formulation, offloading differentiation onto smooth analytical test functions and leaving the data untouched. The method sustains accurate regime identification under severe noise where existing approaches categorically fail, delivers the first data-driven decomposition of a third-order partial differential equation applied to turbulent duct flow, and produces matching decompositions across direct numerical simulation and particle-image velocimetry measurements of a wavy channel flow, uncovering a previously uncharacterized dynamical regime. Weak dominant balance brings mechanism-level analysis out of simulation and onto measured data, and opens complex physical systems to direct, equation-grounded interpretation.

AI.tldr: 提出弱主导平衡框架，无需数值微分即可从噪声实测数据中提取局部物理机制。
AI.translated_summary: 从复杂时空数据中提取可解释的局部物理机制是物理学、生物学和工程学领域的基础性挑战，但在真实测量数据上一直无法实现。核心障碍在于通过数值微分获取高质量数据梯度，这会放大噪声、在高阶方程下发散，并在不规则几何上失效，从而将现有方法的适用范围限制在低阶系统的干净模拟中。在此，我们提出弱主导平衡——一种无导数框架，将控制方程投影到弱（积分）形式中，将微分运算转移至光滑的解析测试函数上，而保持数据本身不受处理。该方法在严重噪声条件下仍能保持准确的区域识别，而现有方法在此条件下完全失效；实现了偏微分方程在湍流管道流中的首次数据驱动三阶分解；并在波浪通道流的直接数值模拟和粒子图像测速实验测量中产生了一致的分解结果，揭示了一个此前未被表征的动力学区域。弱主导平衡将机制层面的分析从模拟推广到实测数据，并为复杂物理系统开启了直接的、以方程为基础的解释途径。
AI.research_problem: 从复杂时空数据中提取可解释的局部物理机制在真实测量数据上无法实现，核心障碍是数值微分会放大噪声、高阶方程下发散、在不规则几何上失效，使现有方法仅适用于低阶系统的干净模拟数据。
AI.key_innovation: 提出弱主导平衡框架，将控制方程投影到弱（积分）形式中，把微分运算转移至光滑解析测试函数上，数据本身无需微分处理，从而实现无导数的机制提取。
AI.motivation: 现有基于数值微分的方法在噪声、高阶方程和不规则几何条件下失效，无法应用于真实测量数据，亟需一种不依赖数值微分的框架来突破这一限制。
AI.method: 将控制方程投影到弱积分形式，利用光滑解析测试函数承担微分运算，数据保持原样不做微分处理，从而在弱形式下进行区域识别和方程分解。
AI.experiments: 在严重噪声条件下进行区域识别测试；对湍流管道流进行三阶偏微分方程的数据驱动分解；对波浪通道流分别在直接数值模拟和粒子图像测速实测数据上进行分解对比。
AI.result: 在严重噪声下仍保持准确的区域识别，而现有方法完全失效；实现了三阶偏微分方程的首次数据驱动分解；DNS与PIV测量结果分解一致，并揭示了一个此前未被表征的动力学区域。
AI.conclusion: 弱主导平衡框架成功将机制层面的分析从模拟推广到实测数据，为复杂物理系统提供了直接的、以方程为基础的解释能力。

title: Multi-Label Node Classification with Label Influence Propagation
summary: Graphs are a complex and versatile data structure used across various domains, with possibly multi-label nodes playing a particularly crucial role. Examples include proteins in PPI networks with multiple functions and users in social or e-commerce networks exhibiting diverse interests. Tackling multi-label node classification (MLNC) on graphs has led to the development of various approaches. Some methods leverage graph neural networks (GNNs) to exploit label co-occurrence correlations, while others incorporate label embeddings to capture label proximity. However, these approaches fail to account for the intricate influences between labels in non-Euclidean graph data. To address this issue, we decompose the message passing process in GNNs into two operations: propagation and transformation. We then conduct a comprehensive analysis and quantification of the influence correlations between labels in each operation. Building on these insights, we propose a novel model, Label Influence Propagation (LIP). Specifically, we construct a label influence graph based on the integrated label correlations. Then, we propagate high-order influences through this graph, dynamically adjusting the learning process by amplifying labels with positive contributions and mitigating those with negative influence. Finally, our framework is evaluated on comprehensive benchmark datasets, consistently outperforming SOTA methods across various settings, demonstrating its effectiveness on MLNC tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出标签影响传播模型LIP，通过分解GNN消息传递并构建标签影响图来建模标签间复杂影响，在多标签节点分类上优于现有方法。
AI.translated_summary: 图是一种复杂且通用的数据结构，广泛应用于各个领域，其中多标签节点扮演着尤为关键的角色。例如，PPI网络中的蛋白质具有多种功能，社交或电商网络中的用户展现出多样化的兴趣。针对图上的多标签节点分类（MLNC）问题，研究者们已开发了多种方法。一些方法利用图神经网络（GNNs）来挖掘标签共现相关性，另一些方法则引入标签嵌入来捕获标签邻近性。然而，这些方法未能考虑非欧几里得图数据中标签之间的复杂影响关系。为解决这一问题，我们将GNN中的消息传递过程分解为传播和变换两个操作，随后对每个操作中标签间的影响相关性进行了全面的分析和量化。基于这些洞察，我们提出了一种新模型——标签影响传播（LIP）。具体而言，我们基于整合的标签相关性构建标签影响图，然后通过该图传播高阶影响，通过放大具有正向贡献的标签并抑制具有负向影响的标签来动态调整学习过程。最后，我们在综合基准数据集上评估了该框架，在各种设置下均持续优于现有最优方法，证明了其在MLNC任务上的有效性。
AI.research_problem: 现有图多标签节点分类方法仅利用标签共现相关性或标签邻近性，未能充分考虑非欧几里得图数据中标签之间的复杂影响关系。
AI.key_innovation: 将GNN消息传递过程分解为传播和变换两个操作，量化分析各操作中标签间的影响相关性，并构建标签影响图来传播高阶影响，动态放大正向贡献标签、抑制负向影响标签。
AI.motivation: 图数据中多标签节点普遍存在（如蛋白质的多功能、用户的多兴趣），但现有方法对标签间复杂交互影响的建模不足，需要更精细的标签关系建模来提升分类性能。
AI.method: 将GNN消息传递分解为传播和变换两个操作，分别分析和量化标签间的影响相关性；基于整合的标签相关性构建标签影响图；通过该图传播高阶影响，动态调整学习过程——放大正向贡献标签、抑制负向影响标签。
AI.experiments: 在综合基准数据集上评估所提出的LIP框架，与多种现有最优方法在不同设置下进行对比实验。
AI.result: LIP在各种设置下持续优于现有最优方法，证明了其在MLNC任务上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模和传播标签间的影响关系，LIP模型有效提升了图多标签节点分类的性能。

title: Ergodicity and High-Frequency Inference for Hybrid Switching Lévy-Driven Stochastic Differential Equations
summary: Hybrid switching Lévy-driven stochastic differential equations with pure-jump noise and state-dependent switching rates are studied under high-frequency observation. A three-stage inference procedure is proposed for the drift, scale, and switching-rate parameters, combining a staged Gaussian quasi-likelihood with an intensity-type contrast. Checkable sufficient conditions for weighted exponential ergodicity are established for the hybrid process; the proof does not rely on Brownian smoothing, but uses a fixed skeleton-chain argument combining small-jump accessibility and regime connectivity. Under ergodicity and the high-frequency sampling scheme, consistency, joint asymptotic normality, and a polynomial-type large deviation inequality are proved for the full estimator. The joint limit exhibits a transparent covariance structure: the drift and scale blocks are coupled through the third moment of the driving Lévy noise, whereas the switching-rate block is asymptotically uncorrelated with the continuous-coefficient blocks. Numerical experiments for models driven by normal inverse Gaussian noise illustrate the finite-sample behavior of the proposed estimators.

AI.tldr: 提出混合切换Lévy驱动SDE的三阶段推断方法，证明了一致性与联合渐近正态性。
AI.translated_summary: 本文研究了在高频观测下具有纯跳跃噪声和状态依赖切换率的混合切换Lévy驱动随机微分方程。提出了一种三阶段推断程序，用于估计漂移、尺度和切换率参数，该方法将分阶段高斯拟似然与强度型对比函数相结合。为该混合过程建立了加权指数遍历性的可验证充分条件；证明不依赖于布朗平滑，而是采用固定骨架链论证，结合小跳跃可达性和状态连通性。在遍历性和高频采样方案下，证明了完整估计量的一致性、联合渐近正态性以及多项式型大偏差不等式。联合极限展现出透明的协方差结构：漂移和尺度块通过驱动Lévy噪声的三阶矩耦合，而切换率块与连续系数块渐近不相关。以正态逆高斯噪声驱动的模型为例进行了数值实验，展示了所提估计量的有限样本行为。
AI.research_problem: 在高频观测下，具有纯跳跃噪声和状态依赖切换率的混合切换Lévy驱动随机微分方程的参数推断问题缺乏系统的理论框架，特别是缺少可验证的遍历性条件以及完整的渐近性质（一致性、联合渐近正态性、大偏差不等式）证明。

AI.motivation: 混合切换Lévy驱动SDE在金融、生物等领域的建模中具有广泛应用，但纯跳跃噪声与状态依赖切换率的结合使得参数估计和遍历性分析具有显著挑战性，亟需发展新的推断方法与渐近理论工具。
AI.method: 三阶段推断：利用分阶段高斯拟似然估计漂移和尺度参数，利用强度型对比函数估计切换率参数；遍历性证明采用固定骨架链论证，结合小跳跃可达性和状态连通性条件，不依赖布朗平滑。
AI.experiments: 以正态逆高斯（NIG）噪声驱动的模型为例进行数值实验，展示所提估计量在有限样本下的表现行为。
AI.result: 在遍历性和高频采样下，完整估计量具有一致性、联合渐近正态性和多项式型大偏差不等式；联合极限协方差结构清晰——漂移与尺度块通过Lévy噪声三阶矩耦合，切换率块与连续系数块渐近不相关。
AI.conclusion: 所提三阶段推断方法在理论和数值上均有效，为混合切换Lévy驱动SDE的参数估计提供了可操作的渐近理论框架，且遍历性条件可验证、协方差结构透明。

title: Offline Reinforcement Learning for Warehouse SLAM Throughput Control
comment: Accepted at 2026 14th International Conference on Control, Mechatronics and Automation (ICCMA 2026)
summary: We present an offline reinforcement learning (RL) framework for optimizing SLAM throughput control in a warehouse fulfillment environment. SLAM (Scan/Label/Apply/Manifest) throughput directly influences system congestion and operational efficiency. Our RL-based control approach dynamically recommends SLAM throughput settings that adaptively balance throughput maximization with downstream stability through intelligent adjustment of throttling behavior. We include a history-informed state representation, action space abstraction for delayed-impact control, and a reward function that captures both upstream and downstream operational metrics. Our approach is algorithm-agnostic, enabling integration of multiple offline RL methods under a unified architecture. We instantiate our framework with three state-of-the-art offline RL algorithms, and trained the models offline using de-identified historical operational logs from a large-scale warehouse. Policy performance is evaluated using a comprehensive multi-method strategy. These include model-free approaches including immediate reward estimation via regression models and long-horizon Fitted Q Evaluation (FQE), as well as model-based Deep Koopman dynamics evaluation. Empirical results reveal that the CQL policy consistently outperforms alternatives, improving system health by 22.97% and reducing average throttling duration by 3.18%. These findings demonstrate the potential of offline RL for safe and scalable warehouse throughput control optimization.

AI.tldr: 提出离线强化学习框架优化仓库SLAM吞吐量控制，CQL策略将系统健康度提升22.
AI.translated_summary: 我们提出了一个离线强化学习（RL）框架，用于优化仓库履行环境中的SLAM吞吐量控制。SLAM（扫描/贴标/应用/清单）吞吐量直接影响系统拥堵和运营效率。我们基于RL的控制方法通过智能调节限流行为，动态推荐SLAM吞吐量设置，自适应地平衡吞吐量最大化与下游稳定性。我们的方法包含历史信息状态表示、面向延迟影响控制的动作空间抽象，以及同时捕获上游和下游运营指标的奖励函数。该方法与算法无关，能够在统一架构下集成多种离线RL方法。我们用三种最先进的离线RL算法实例化了该框架，并使用来自大规模仓库的去标识化历史运营日志离线训练了模型。策略性能通过综合多方法策略进行评估，包括无模型方法（通过回归模型进行即时奖励估计和长时域拟合Q评估FQE）以及基于模型的深度Koopman动力学评估。实证结果表明，CQL策略持续优于其他方案，将系统健康度提升了22.97%，并将平均限流持续时间降低了3.18%。这些发现证明了离线RL在安全且可扩展的仓库吞吐量控制优化方面的潜力。

AI.key_innovation: 提出了一个与算法无关的离线RL框架，包含历史信息状态表示、面向延迟影响控制的动作空间抽象、以及同时捕获上下游运营指标的综合奖励函数，并支持多种离线RL算法的统一集成。
AI.motivation: SLAM吞吐量直接影响仓库系统的拥堵程度和运营效率，需要一种能够自适应平衡吞吐量最大化与下游稳定性的控制方法，同时确保策略部署的安全性和可扩展性。
AI.method: 采用离线强化学习方法，设计了历史信息状态表示、动作空间抽象和综合奖励函数；框架与算法无关，可集成多种离线RL算法；使用三种SOTA离线RL算法实例化，基于大规模仓库历史运营日志进行离线训练。
AI.experiments: 使用大规模仓库的去标识化历史运营日志离线训练模型；采用多方法综合评估策略性能，包括无模型方法（回归模型即时奖励估计和长时域FQE）以及基于模型的深度Koopman动力学评估。
AI.result: CQL策略在所有评估中持续优于其他方案，系统健康度提升22.97%，平均限流持续时间降低3.18%。
AI.conclusion: 离线强化学习在仓库吞吐量控制优化方面具有安全性和可扩展性的潜力，能够有效平衡吞吐量最大化与系统稳定性。

title: Higher-Order Fourier Neural Operator: Explicit Mode Mixer for Nonlinear PDEs
summary: Neural operators provide deep neural networks for learning mappings between function spaces. Among them, the Fourier Neural Operator (FNO) is particularly effective: its spectral convolution relies on low-dimensional Fourier-domain representations and can handle inputs at different resolutions. This design aligns well with settings where the Fourier basis diagonalizes the underlying operator, such as linear, constant-coefficient PDEs on periodic domains, in which Fourier modes evolve independently. However, nonlinear PDEs may benefit from an additional inductive bias, as they exhibit structured interactions between modes, governed by polynomial nonlinearities. To capture this inductive bias, we introduce the Higher-Order Spectral Convolution, a spectral mixer that extends FNO from diagonal modulation to explicit n-linear mode mixing, aligned with the dynamics of nonlinear PDEs. Our experiments on standard benchmarks show that the proposed Higher-Order FNO (HO-FNO) retains the efficiency of FNO-based architectures and consistently improves over other spectral neural operators. HO-FNO also performs on par with or better than state-of-the-art transformers and state-space models on several datasets, with stronger gains in highly nonlinear regimes, such as the Poisson equation with polynomial forcing, where a single HO-FNO layer outperforms FNO models with up to 16 layers. We open-source our code for reproducibility at: https://github.com/AlexColagrande/HO-FNO.

AI.tldr: 提出高阶谱卷积将FNO从对角调制扩展为n线性模式混合，在非线性PDE上显著优于FNO。
AI.translated_summary: 神经算子提供了用于学习函数空间之间映射的深度神经网络。其中，傅里叶神经算子（FNO）尤为有效：其谱卷积依赖于低维傅里叶域表示，并且能够处理不同分辨率的输入。这一设计与傅里叶基对角化底层算子的场景高度契合，例如周期域上的线性常系数偏微分方程（PDE），其中傅里叶模式独立演化。然而，非线性PDE可能受益于额外的归纳偏置，因为它们展现出由多项式非线性支配的模式间结构化交互。为了捕捉这一归纳偏置，我们提出了高阶谱卷积（Higher-Order Spectral Convolution），这是一种将FNO从对角调制扩展到显式n线性模式混合的谱混合器，与非线性PDE的动力学相一致。我们在标准基准上的实验表明，所提出的高阶FNO（HO-FNO）保持了基于FNO架构的效率，并持续优于其他谱神经算子。HO-FNO在多个数据集上的表现也与最先进的Transformer和状态空间模型相当或更优，在高非线性区域中增益更为显著，例如具有多项式强迫的泊松方程，其中单层HO-FNO优于多达16层的FNO模型。我们在以下地址开源了代码以供复现：https://github.com/AlexColagrande/HO-FNO。
AI.research_problem: FNO的谱卷积采用对角调制，假设傅里叶模式独立演化，无法显式建模非线性PDE中由多项式非线性支配的模式间结构化交互。
AI.key_innovation: 提出高阶谱卷积（Higher-Order Spectral Convolution），将FNO的对角调制扩展为显式n线性模式混合，直接对齐非线性PDE的动力学结构。
AI.motivation: 非线性PDE中傅里叶模式之间存在由多项式非线性支配的结构化交互，FNO的对角调制设计无法捕捉这种交互，需要额外的归纳偏置。
AI.method: 在FNO的谱卷积框架中，将对角调制推广为n线性模式混合操作，使谱混合器能够显式表达非线性PDE中模式间的高阶交互关系。
AI.experiments: 在标准基准上与多种谱神经算子、最先进的Transformer和状态空间模型进行对比实验，重点测试了高非线性区域（如多项式强迫的泊松方程）的表现。
AI.result: HO-FNO保持FNO架构效率的同时持续优于其他谱神经算子；在多个数据集上与Transformer和状态空间模型相当或更优；在高非线性区域中，单层HO-FNO优于多达16层的FNO模型。
AI.conclusion: 高阶谱卷积通过显式n线性模式混合有效捕捉非线性PDE的归纳偏置，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升了非线性问题上的性能。

collection_reason: supplemental query: (ti:"latent dynamics" OR abs:"latent dynamics" OR ti:"reduced order" OR abs:"reduced order") AND (ti:model OR abs:model OR ti:learning OR abs:learning)
title: Predictable GRPO: A Closed-Form Model of Training Dynamics
summary: We develop a first-principles reduced-order model of these dynamics. Under a single mean-field assumption that summarizes the policy by its expected reward, we reduce the GRPO update to a stochastically-forced damped oscillator whose mass, damping, and stiffness are fixed in closed form by the optimizer hyperparameters together with a single measured curvature scale -- momentum supplies the inertia, off-policy lag erodes the damping, and the group size enters, to leading order, as a noise temperature. The reduction has three consequences. First, it subsumes the empirical single-exponential saturation law as its overdamped limit, recasting the fitted plateau, timescale, and size exponent as the fixed point, inverse stiffness, and curvature-scaling exponent of the underlying potential, and adding, through the retained inertial term, the slow-start phase the single exponential cannot represent. Second, it yields predictions tied to independently measurable quantities rather than fitted ones: group-size invariance of the deterministic trajectory with a $1/G$ stationary fluctuation, a sharp stability threshold in the refresh interval, and an overdamped-to-oscillatory transition. Third, it furnishes diagnostics that separate failure modes a reward curve alone conflates -- reward hacking, advantage degeneracy, policy concentration, and dynamical instability. Across three models and two group sizes, the closed-form trajectory fits training reward to $R^2 \geq 0.91$ and the mean trajectory is group-size invariant to leading order -- on both the reward curve and out-of-distribution transfer to eight math benchmarks -- while the within-group reward spread retains a residual $G$-dependence that the leading-order temperature picture does not capture.

AI.tldr: 将GRPO更新化简为随机阻尼振荡器，提供闭式训练轨迹与失效模式诊断。
AI.translated_summary: 我们构建了这些动力学的一阶原理降阶模型。在一个将策略以其期望奖励概括的均场假设下，我们将GRPO更新化简为一个随机受迫阻尼振荡器，其质量、阻尼和刚度由优化器超参数连同单一测量的曲率尺度以闭式确定——动量提供惯性，离策略滞后侵蚀阻尼，而组大小在主导阶上作为噪声温度进入。该化简有三个推论。第一，它将经验性的单指数饱和律作为其过阻尼极限纳入，将拟合的平台、时间尺度和尺寸指数重新表述为底层势能的不动点、逆刚度和曲率缩放指数，并通过保留的惯性项添加了单指数无法表示的慢启动阶段。第二，它产生了与可独立测量的量而非拟合量相联系的预测：确定性轨迹的组大小不变性及1/G的稳态涨落、刷新间隔中的尖锐稳定性阈值，以及过阻尼到振荡的相变。第三，它提供了将奖励曲线单独混淆的失效模式区分开来的诊断——奖励黑客、优势退化、策略集中和动力学不稳定性。在三个模型和两个组大小上，闭式轨迹对训练奖励的拟合达到R²≥0.91，且均值轨迹在主导阶上具有组大小不变性——在奖励曲线和向八个数学基准的分布外迁移上均如此——而组内奖励展宽保留了主导阶温度图像未能捕捉的残余G依赖性。
AI.research_problem: GRPO训练动力学的经验性描述（如单指数饱和律）缺乏机制性理解，且奖励曲线无法区分不同失效模式（奖励黑客、优势退化、策略集中、动力学不稳定性）。
AI.key_innovation: 在均场假设下将GRPO更新严格化简为随机受迫阻尼振荡器，其质量、阻尼、刚度均由超参数和单一曲率尺度闭式确定，从而将动量、离策略滞后和组大小分别映射为惯性、阻尼侵蚀和噪声温度。
AI.motivation: 现有对GRPO训练动态的理解依赖经验拟合律，缺乏与可独立测量量关联的预测能力，且无法分离多种被奖励曲线混淆的失效模式。
AI.method: 基于一阶原理构建降阶模型：在策略以期望奖励概括的均场假设下，将GRPO更新映射为随机受迫阻尼振荡器；模型参数（质量、阻尼、刚度）由优化器超参数和单一测量曲率尺度闭式确定；由此推导过阻尼极限、稳定性阈值和相变预测。
AI.experiments: 在三个模型和两个组大小上验证闭式轨迹对训练奖励的拟合精度，并测试分布外迁移至八个数学基准的组大小不变性，同时检验组内奖励展宽的G依赖性。
AI.result: 闭式轨迹拟合训练奖励R²≥0.91；均值轨迹在主导阶上对组大小不变（包括奖励曲线和八个数学基准的分布外迁移）；组内奖励展宽保留了主导阶温度图像未捕捉的残余G依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 该降阶模型统一解释了经验饱和律、提供了与可测量量关联的定量预测，并能区分奖励曲线无法分离的多种失效模式，为GRPO训练动态提供了机制性理解与实用诊断工具。
AI.limitations: 主导阶温度图像未能捕捉组内奖励展宽中残余的G依赖性，表明均场假设在描述组内涨落时存在不足。

collection_reason: supplemental query: (ti:"data-driven" OR abs:"data-driven" OR ti:"data driven" OR abs:"data driven") AND (ti:dynamics OR abs:dynamics OR ti:dynamical OR abs:dynamical)
title: Data-driven linear analysis of turbulent flows
summary: Mean-flow-based linear analyses of turbulent flows, such as resolvent analysis, provide valuable insight about flow structures and their dynamics that has been widely leveraged to model, control and understand the underlying flow physics. However, these analyses are computationally expensive for flows over complex geometries and require the use of specialized codes that are typically only available in research environments. On the other hand, data-driven modal decompositions, such as the dynamic mode decomposition (DMD), identify turbulent flow structures that, although statistically relevant, do not provide insight into the physical mechanisms driving their dynamics. Here we introduce a novel data-driven method -- nonlinearity-subtracted DMD (NSDMD) -- that leverages knowledge of the structure of the Navier--Stokes equations to ensure that the learned operator is a low-rank approximation of the underlying mean-flow-linearized dynamics. Specifically, the method uses snapshots of the nonlinear terms in the perturbation equations to explicitly account for the contribution of the nonlinear forcing to the dynamics. We demonstrate the use of NSDMD to perform data-driven resolvent analysis on direct numerical simulation (DNS) and large-eddy simulation (LES) datasets, starting with a minimal channel flow and scaling up to the flow over a full aircraft model. As a result, NSDMD allows performing linear analyses of turbulent flows as a post-processing step on simulation data obtained with any available high-fidelity computational fluid dynamics (CFD) code.

AI.tldr: 提出NSDMD方法，通过扣除非线性项实现数据驱动的湍流线性分析，可作为任意CFD后处理步骤。
AI.translated_summary: 基于平均流的湍流线性分析（如预解分析）能够提供关于流动结构及其动力学的重要见解，已被广泛用于建模、控制和理解底层流动物理。然而，这些分析对于复杂几何上的流动计算成本高昂，且需要使用通常仅在研究环境中可用的专用代码。另一方面，数据驱动的模态分解方法（如动态模态分解DMD）虽然能识别统计相关的湍流结构，但无法揭示驱动其动力学的物理机制。本文提出了一种新型数据驱动方法——非线性扣除DMD（NSDMD），该方法利用Navier-Stokes方程的结构知识，确保学习到的算子是对底层平均流线性化动力学的低秩近似。具体而言，该方法利用扰动方程中非线性项的快照，显式地考虑非线性强迫对动力学的贡献。我们展示了NSDMD在直接数值模拟（DNS）和大涡模拟（LES）数据集上进行数据驱动预解分析的应用，从最小槽道流开始，逐步扩展到全机模型绕流。因此，NSDMD允许将湍流的线性分析作为对任何可用的高保真计算流体力学（CFD）代码获得的模拟数据的后处理步骤来执行。
AI.research_problem: 传统基于平均流的线性分析（如预解分析）计算昂贵且依赖专用代码，而数据驱动的DMD虽能识别湍流结构却无法揭示驱动其动力学的物理机制，两者之间存在方法空白。
AI.key_innovation: 提出NSDMD方法，利用Navier-Stokes方程结构知识，通过扰动方程中非线性项的快照显式扣除非线性强迫贡献，使学习算子成为平均流线性化动力学的低秩近似，从而将数据驱动方法与物理机制分析相结合。
AI.motivation: 现有线性分析方法计算成本高且依赖专用代码，数据驱动方法缺乏物理机制洞察，需要一种既能利用任意CFD数据又能揭示物理机制的分析方法。
AI.method: NSDMD利用Navier-Stokes方程结构知识，通过扰动方程中非线性项的快照显式扣除非线性强迫对动力学的贡献，确保学习算子是平均流线性化动力学的低秩近似，从而实现数据驱动的预解分析。
AI.experiments: 在DNS和LES数据集上验证，从最小槽道流逐步扩展到全机模型绕流，展示方法的可扩展性。
AI.result: NSDMD成功在从槽道流到全机模型绕流的DNS和LES数据上实现了数据驱动的预解分析。
AI.conclusion: NSDMD使湍流线性分析可作为任意高保真CFD代码模拟数据的后处理步骤执行，无需专用代码。

title: Learning-based control of a single-DOF Aero system
comment: This paper is part of the EURODINAME III proceedings (https://cloud.femto-st.fr/nextcloud/index.php/s/RSx8gPH5sJgcxyD)
summary: This paper presents a learning-based control framework that integrates feedback linearization with reinforcement learning for the adaptive control of nonlinear mechatronic systems. The control law is derived using Lyapunov stability analysis, ensuring closed-loop stability in the presence of modeling uncertainties and external disturbances. Feedback linearization serves as the main control framework, while a reinforcement learning component estimates and compensates for unmodeled dynamics and disturbances online. The learning module is based on the REINFORCE-with-baseline algorithm, which improves learning efficiency by reducing the variance of policy-gradient estimates and enabling stable policy updates during adaptation. The proposed controller is evaluated on a single-degree-of-freedom rotor-based AERO system. Results from simulations demonstrate accurate trajectory tracking, fast adaptation, and strong robustness against parameter variations and external disturbances. Overall, the proposed approach combines the analytical guarantees of Lyapunov-based control with the adaptability of reinforcement learning, providing an effective solution for controlling nonlinear mechatronic systems.

AI.tldr: 结合反馈线性化与强化学习实现非线性机电系统的自适应鲁棒控制。
AI.translated_summary: 本文提出了一种基于学习的控制框架，将反馈线性化与强化学习相结合，用于非线性机电系统的自适应控制。控制律通过李雅普诺夫稳定性分析推导得出，确保在存在建模不确定性和外部扰动的情况下闭环系统的稳定性。反馈线性化作为主要控制框架，而强化学习组件在线估计并补偿未建模动态和扰动。学习模块基于带基线的REINFORCE算法，通过减小策略梯度估计的方差并实现自适应过程中策略的稳定更新来提高学习效率。所提出的控制器在单自由度旋翼式AERO系统上进行了评估。仿真结果表明，该控制器具有精确的轨迹跟踪能力、快速的自适应性以及对参数变化和外部扰动的强鲁棒性。总体而言，所提出的方法将基于李雅普诺夫控制的分析保证与强化学习的自适应能力相结合，为非线性机电系统的控制提供了有效解决方案。
AI.research_problem: 非线性机电系统在存在建模不确定性和外部扰动时，传统控制方法难以同时保证稳定性和在线自适应能力，需要一种兼顾理论稳定性保证与自适应补偿的控制方法。
AI.key_innovation: 将基于李雅普诺夫稳定性分析的反馈线性化控制框架与基于REINFORCE-with-baseline算法的强化学习模块相结合，前者提供闭环稳定性保证，后者在线估计并补偿未建模动态与扰动，实现分析保证与学习自适应的融合。
AI.motivation: 非线性机电系统面临建模不确定性和外部扰动，单一控制方法难以同时满足稳定性保证和在线自适应需求，因此需要将分析控制理论与强化学习方法结合以兼顾两者优势。
AI.method: 以反馈线性化为主控制框架，通过李雅普诺夫稳定性分析推导控制律保证闭环稳定性；引入基于REINFORCE-with-baseline算法的强化学习模块，在线估计并补偿未建模动态和扰动，通过减小策略梯度估计的方差提高学习效率和策略更新稳定性。
AI.experiments: 在单自由度旋翼式AERO系统上进行仿真验证，评估轨迹跟踪精度、自适应速度以及对参数变化和外部扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，所提出的控制器实现了精确的轨迹跟踪、快速的自适应性以及对参数变化和外部扰动的强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法成功将李雅普诺夫控制的分析保证与强化学习的自适应能力相结合，为非线性机电系统的控制提供了有效解决方案。
AI.limitations: 仅通过仿真验证，未在真实物理系统上进行实验；仅评估了单自由度系统，多自由度复杂系统的适用性尚未验证。

collection_reason: supplemental query: (ti:stochastic OR abs:stochastic) AND (ti:dynamics OR abs:dynamics OR ti:dynamical OR abs:dynamical)
title: Timesynth: A Temporal Fidelity Framework for Health Signal Digital Twins
summary: Forecasting models for health-signal digital twins must preserve the oscillatory, frequency, phase, and state-transition dynamics of physiological signals, yet the pointwise metrics used to benchmark them cannot detect when these fundamental properties are lost. We show that this blind spot misranks models: across 11 architectures, models with comparable pointwise error diverge by up to 53° in phase accuracy, equivalent to roughly 123 ms for a 1.2 Hz cardiac rhythm and invisible to standard metrics. To enable development of models that escape such failures, we introduce TimeSynth, a controlled benchmarking framework with two reusable components: a physiologically grounded generator producing signals with analytically known ground-truth dynamics from parametric models fitted to real electroencephalography, electrocardiography and photoplethysmogram signals, along with diagnostics quantifying amplitude, frequency, phase, and state-transition fidelity. Linear and full-sequence attention models systematically lose frequency and phase information despite acceptable amplitude error, whereas architectures with localized temporal structure better preserve dynamical fidelity and adapt to observable state transitions; none, however, reliably preserves stochastic switching. Because the dominant determinant of fidelity is architectural, model choice becomes a principled, use-case-driven decision rather than a search for a single winner. TimeSynth thus supplies the controlled preclinical stress test missing before models are coupled to patient data, with a reusable generator and diagnostics for fidelity-aware development.

AI.tldr: 提出TimeSynth基准框架，揭示逐点误差指标无法检测生理信号动力学特性的丢失，并据此评估11种架构的保真度差异。
AI.translated_summary: 健康信号数字孪生的预测模型必须保留生理信号的振荡、频率、相位和状态转换动力学，然而用于基准测试的逐点指标无法检测这些基本特性何时丢失。我们表明这一盲区会导致模型排序错误：在11种架构中，逐点误差相当的模型在相位精度上相差高达53°，对于1.2 Hz的心律而言相当于约123毫秒，且标准指标无法察觉。为推动开发能够避免此类失败的模型，我们引入了TimeSynth，一个具有两个可复用组件的受控基准测试框架：一是基于生理学的信号生成器，通过拟合真实脑电图、心电图和光电容积脉搏波信号的参数模型产生具有解析已知真值动力学的信号；二是量化振幅、频率、相位和状态转换保真度的诊断工具。线性和全序列注意力模型尽管振幅误差可接受，却系统性丢失频率和相位信息；而具有局部时间结构的架构能更好地保持动力学保真度并适应可观测的状态转换；然而，没有任何架构能可靠地保持随机切换。由于保真度的主要决定因素是架构层面的，模型选择成为一个有原则的、基于用例的决策，而非寻找单一最优模型。因此，TimeSynth提供了在模型与患者数据耦合之前缺失的受控临床前压力测试，并附带可复用的生成器和诊断工具以支持保真度感知的开发。
AI.research_problem: 健康信号数字孪生预测模型的基准测试中，逐点误差指标无法检测振荡、频率、相位和状态转换等基本动力学特性的丢失，导致模型排序错误和潜在的临床风险。
AI.key_innovation: 提出TimeSynth受控基准测试框架，包含基于生理学的信号生成器（具有解析已知的真值动力学）和量化振幅、频率、相位及状态转换保真度的诊断工具，填补了逐点指标无法评估动力学保真度的空白。
AI.motivation: 现有逐点指标对动力学特性的丢失存在盲区，模型间相位精度差异可达53°（约123ms），标准指标完全无法察觉，因此需要能够系统评估动力学保真度的受控框架。
AI.method: 构建TimeSynth框架，利用拟合真实EEG、ECG和PPG信号的参数模型生成具有已知真值动力学的生理信号，并设计诊断工具量化振幅、频率、相位和状态转换保真度，对11种架构进行系统评估。
AI.experiments: 在TimeSynth框架下对11种预测模型架构进行基准测试，使用来自真实生理信号拟合的参数化生成器产生测试信号，并通过振幅、频率、相位和状态转换保真度诊断进行系统比较。
AI.result: 线性和全序列注意力模型在振幅误差可接受的情况下系统性丢失频率和相位信息；具有局部时间结构的架构更好地保持动力学保真度并适应状态转换；但没有任何架构能可靠保持随机切换特性。保真度的主要决定因素是架构层面的。
AI.conclusion: TimeSynth提供了模型与患者数据耦合前缺失的受控临床前压力测试，其可复用的生成器和诊断工具支持保真度感知的模型开发，使模型选择成为基于用例的原则性决策而非寻找单一最优模型。
AI.limitations: 没有任何被测架构能可靠保持随机切换特性；框架目前仅覆盖EEG、ECG和PPG三类信号，对其他生理信号的适用性尚未验证。

title: Homogenization of $\ell_2$-Adversarial Training in High-Dimensions: Exact Dynamics under Stochastic Gradient Descent
summary: We develop a framework for analyzing the learning dynamics of $\ell_2$-adversarial training of single-index models on Gaussian mixtures in the high-dimensional limit under streaming stochastic gradient descent (SGD). We derive deterministic equivalents for a broad class of statistics of the SGD iterates, including the adversarial risk and distance to adversarial optimality, in terms of the solution to a system of ODEs. We use them to study two idealized learning rate schedules: the Polyak stepsize and exact line search. In the case of $\ell_2$-adversarial least squares with a single class, we show that, unlike noiseless standard least squares, no constant learning rate guarantees monotone descent of SGD towards a minimizer of the adversarial risk. We identify anisotropic covariance and a mismatch in ridge parameters as the main sources of suboptimality of exact line search relative to the Polyak stepsize. We also introduce a stochastic differential equation (SDE), called adversarial homogenized SGD, that captures the evolution of statistics of the iterates of SGD. For $\ell_2$-adversarial least squares, using this SDE, we show the evolution of the risk is equivalent, up to dimension-free constants, to that of SGD on standard least squares with an adaptive learning rate and adaptive $\ell_2$-regularization. When the dynamics converge, the limiting adversarial risk and SGD iterate are determined by a fixed-point equation, with the limiting iterate being equivalent to the solution of a ridge regression problem whose regularization parameter is the limiting effective regularization of SGD.

AI.tldr: 提出ODE/SDE框架分析高维ℓ₂对抗训练SGD动态，揭示其与自适应正则化标准最小二乘的等价性。
AI.translated_summary: 我们开发了一个框架，用于分析在高维极限下高斯混合上单指标模型的ℓ₂对抗训练在流式随机梯度下降（SGD）中的学习动态。我们推导了SGD迭代的一大类统计量的确定性等价物，包括对抗风险和到对抗最优性的距离，这些等价物由一个常微分方程（ODE）系统的解来表示。我们利用它们研究了两种理想化的学习率调度：Polyak步长和精确线搜索。在单类ℓ₂对抗最小二乘的情况下，我们表明，与无噪声标准最小二乘不同，没有任何常数学习率能保证SGD朝对抗风险最小化子的单调下降。我们识别出各向异性协方差和岭参数的不匹配是精确线搜索相对于Polyak步长次优性的主要来源。我们还引入了一个随机微分方程（SDE），称为对抗均匀化SGD，它捕捉了SGD迭代统计量的演化。对于ℓ₂对抗最小二乘，利用该SDE，我们表明风险的演化在无维度常数意义下等价于在自适应学习率和自适应ℓ₂正则化下标准最小二乘SGD的风险演化。当动力学收敛时，极限对抗风险和SGD迭代由一个不动点方程确定，其中极限迭代等价于一个岭回归问题的解，其正则化参数为SGD的极限有效正则化参数。
AI.research_problem: 高维极限下ℓ₂对抗训练的SGD学习动态缺乏精确的理论分析框架，特别是对抗风险的演化规律、最优学习率调度的性质，以及对抗训练与标准训练之间的定量等价关系尚不明确。
AI.key_innovation: 提出了确定性等价物框架与对抗均匀化SGD（SDE），将对抗训练SGD的迭代统计量演化通过ODE/SDE系统精确刻画，并证明ℓ₂对抗最小二乘的风险演化等价于带自适应学习率和自适应ℓ₂正则化的标准最小二乘SGD。
AI.motivation: 对抗训练是提升模型鲁棒性的核心方法，但其在高维设定下的学习动态理论理解不足，缺乏精确分析工具来揭示对抗训练与标准训练的本质联系及最优训练策略。
AI.method: 在高斯混合模型上建立单指标模型的ℓ₂对抗训练框架，推导SGD迭代统计量的确定性等价物（由ODE系统描述），引入对抗均匀化SGD（SDE）捕捉迭代统计量演化，并分析Polyak步长与精确线搜索两种学习率调度。
AI.experiments: 以理论分析为主，通过推导确定性等价物和SDE进行解析研究，重点考察单类ℓ₂对抗最小二乘场景下不同学习率调度的行为及风险演化规律。
AI.result: （1）单类ℓ₂对抗最小二乘中无常数学习率能保证SGD单调下降至对抗风险最小化子；（2）各向异性协方差和岭参数不匹配是精确线搜索次优的主因；（3）风险演化等价于带自适应学习率和自适应ℓ₂正则化的标准最小二乘SGD；（4）收敛时极限迭代等价于岭回归解，正则化参数为SGD的极限有效正则化。
AI.conclusion: ℓ₂对抗训练的SGD动态可通过ODE/SDE系统精确刻画，其本质等价于带自适应正则化的标准最小二乘训练，极限解由不动点方程确定并对应岭回归问题。
AI.limitations: 摘要中未明确提及局限性，但分析限于高斯混合上的单指标模型和ℓ₂对抗扰动，向更一般数据分布、其他对抗扰动范数及多类设置的推广尚待研究。

collection_reason: supplemental query: (ti:koopman OR abs:koopman OR ti:"transfer operator" OR abs:"transfer operator") AND (ti:learning OR abs:learning OR ti:"data-driven" OR abs:"data-driven")
title: Partial Observation of Linear Systems with the Mori-Zwanzig Formalism
summary:
The Mori-Zwanzig formalism provides a systematic framework for deriving reduced-order model of dynamical systems when only part of the state is observed, but its practical use is often limited by the complexity of the resulting computations. This paper develops an explicit formulation of the Mori-Zwanzig equation for linear time-invariant systems under partially observed observables. By expressing the dynamics in terms of observables, the Koopman generator, and projections onto resolved and unresolved components, we derive closed-form representations of the Markovian, noise, and memory contributions that arise in the Mori-Zwanzig identity.
  For the linear setting, the resulting formulas recover the reduced dynamics obtained from the variation-of-constants formula while retaining the operator-based structure of the Mori-Zwanzig approach. This makes the derivation a transparent reference case for reduced-order modelling with memory and clarifies how unresolved variables influence the observed dynamics through history-dependent terms. The analysis also identifies the ingredients needed for extensions to nonlinear systems and more general projections, including spectral filtering and data-driven approximations of memory effects. Analytical and numerical examples involving the harmonic oscillator and wave equations illustrate the construction and demonstrate how the formalism can be used to obtain interpretable reduced-order models for partially observed systems.

AI.tldr: 针对线性时不变系统推导了Mori-Zwanzig方程的显式闭式表述，为含记忆的降阶建模提供透明参考。
AI.translated_summary: Mori-Zwanzig形式化在仅观测到部分状态时为推导动力学系统的降阶模型提供了系统化的框架，但其实际应用常因所得计算的复杂性而受到限制。本文针对线性时不变系统在部分可观测量条件下，发展了Mori-Zwanzig方程的显式表述。通过将动力学以可观测量、Koopman生成子以及向已分辨和未分辨分量的投影来表示，我们推导出了Mori-Zwanzig恒等式中产生的马尔可夫项、噪声项和记忆项的闭式表示。对于线性情形，所得公式恢复了由常数变易法得到的降阶动力学，同时保留了Mori-Zwanzig方法的算子化结构。这使得该推导成为含记忆降阶建模的一个透明参考案例，并阐明了未分辨变量如何通过历史依赖项影响观测动力学。该分析还指出了向非线性系统和更一般投影扩展所需的要素，包括谱滤波和记忆效应的数据驱动近似。涉及谐振子和波动方程的解析与数值示例说明了该构造方法，并展示了如何利用该形式化为部分观测系统获得可解释的降阶模型。
AI.research_problem: Mori-Zwanzig形式化虽为部分观测系统的降阶建模提供了系统框架，但实际应用受限于计算复杂性，缺乏针对线性时不变系统的显式闭式表述来清晰揭示记忆项等各贡献的结构。
AI.key_innovation: 利用可观测量、Koopman生成子及向已分辨/未分辨分量的投影，首次针对线性时不变系统推导出Mori-Zwanzig恒等式中马尔可夫项、噪声项和记忆项的闭式表示，并与常数变易法结果建立等价联系。
AI.motivation: Mori-Zwanzig形式化具有理论系统性和算子化结构优势，但计算复杂性阻碍了其实际应用；需要一个透明的线性参考案例来揭示未分辨变量通过历史依赖项影响观测动力学的机制，并为非线性扩展指明方向。
AI.method: 将动力学表示为可观测量、Koopman生成子和投影算子的形式，在线性时不变设定下推导Markovian项、噪声项和记忆项的闭式公式，并通过常数变易法验证一致性；以谐振子和波动方程为解析与数值算例进行演示。
AI.experiments: 采用谐振子和波动方程作为解析与数值示例，展示构造方法并验证形式化在部分观测系统降阶建模中的可解释性。
AI.result: 在线性情形下，闭式公式恢复了常数变易法的降阶动力学，同时保留了Mori-Zwanzig方法的算子化结构；数值与解析示例表明该方法能生成可解释的降阶模型。
AI.conclusion: 该推导为含记忆的降阶建模提供了透明的线性参考案例，阐明了未分辨变量通过历史依赖项影响观测动力学的机制，并为非线性系统和更一般投影的扩展指明了所需要素（谱滤波、数据驱动记忆近似）。
AI.limitations: 当前显式表述仅限于线性时不变系统；向非线性系统和更一般投影的扩展尚未实现，仅指出了所需要素（谱滤波和数据驱动近似），有待后续研究。

title: Operator Learning for Cubic Nonlinear Schrödinger Equation on Periodic Domains
summary: We consider the cubic nonlinear Schrödinger (NLS) equation on two-dimensional flat tori with varying aspect ratios. In this formulation, the choice of aspect ratio governs the Fourier resonance structure, so rational and irrational geometries can exhibit different high-frequency cascade behaviors. We present a geometry-conditioned Fourier neural operator (FNO) for the cubic defocusing NLS equation, where the input consists of the real and imaginary parts of the solution together with the aspect-ratio parameter \(ω^2\). The model is trained to approximate the one-step solution operator and is evaluated on unseen trajectories generated from random-phase initial data using Fourier pseudospectral method. Our numerical experiments show that the learned operator captures the main solution dynamics on both tori and reproduces the distinct Sobolev norm behavior of the two geometries, with stronger \(H^2\)-growth on the rational torus and more constrained behavior on the irrational torus, consistent with the findings of \cite{hrabski2021energy}. We perform ablation studies to examine the roles of retained Fourier modes, activation functions, Fourier-layer depth, and explicit geometry conditioning. The results indicate that including $ω^2$ improves long-time predictive accuracy, especially for the rational geometry, and supports the use of geometry-aware neural operators for learning spectral-transfer phenomena in nonlinear dispersive partial differential equations.

AI.tldr: 几何条件化的FNO能有效学习不同纵横比二维环面上NLS方程的谱转移行为
AI.translated_summary: 我们研究了在具有不同纵横比的二维平坦环面上的三次非线性薛定谔（NLS）方程。在此表述中，纵横比的选择决定了傅里叶共振结构，因此有理几何和无理几何可以表现出不同的高频级联行为。我们提出了一种用于三次去聚焦NLS方程的几何条件化傅里叶神经算子（FNO），其输入由解的实部和虚部以及纵横比参数ω²组成。该模型被训练以近似单步解算子，并在使用傅里叶伪谱方法从随机相位初始数据生成的未见轨迹上进行评估。我们的数值实验表明，学习到的算子在两种环面上均能捕捉主要的解动力学，并重现两种几何不同的Sobolev范数行为——有理环上H²增长更强，无理环上行为更受约束，这与文献[hrabski2021energy]的发现一致。我们进行了消融研究，以检验保留的傅里叶模式、激活函数、傅里叶层深度和显式几何条件化的作用。结果表明，加入ω²提高了长时间预测精度，尤其对于有理几何，并支持使用几何感知神经算子来学习非线性色散偏微分方程中的谱转移现象。
AI.research_problem: 如何在具有不同纵横比（有理与无理几何）的二维平坦环面上，学习三次去聚焦NLS方程的解算子，并捕捉不同几何下傅里叶共振结构导致的高频级联行为差异。
AI.key_innovation: 提出几何条件化的傅里叶神经算子（FNO），将纵横比参数ω²作为显式输入条件，使模型能够感知几何结构对谱转移行为的影响。
AI.motivation: 二维环面的纵横比决定傅里叶共振结构，有理与无理几何展现出不同的高频级联和Sobolev范数行为，传统神经算子缺乏对几何条件的显式感知，难以准确捕捉此类谱转移现象。
AI.method: 构建几何条件化FNO，输入为解的实部、虚部及纵横比参数ω²，训练模型近似单步解算子；采用傅里叶伪谱方法生成随机相位初始数据的轨迹进行训练和评估。
AI.experiments: 在未见过的轨迹上评估模型，比较有理环与无理环上的预测表现；开展消融研究，考察保留傅里叶模式数量、激活函数、傅里叶层深度及显式几何条件化各因素的影响。
AI.result: 学习到的算子在两种环面上均能捕捉主要解动力学，并重现有理环上更强的H²增长和无理环上更受约束的行为；加入ω²显著提升长时间预测精度，尤其对有理几何效果明显。
AI.conclusion: 几何感知神经算子能够有效学习非线性色散偏微分方程中的谱转移现象，显式引入纵横比条件化对提升预测精度具有重要作用，尤其有利于有理几何情形。

title: Structure-preserving dynamical low-rank approximation for parametric elastic guided waves
comment: Corrected typos. Page 4: simplified update rule in the Störmer-Verlet scheme. Page 24: improved description of the modal ROM. Results unchanged. Page 12, section 5.2: added argument
summary: Elastic guided waves are widely used in Structural Health Monitoring (SHM). In many-query settings, the computational cost of high-fidelity simulations motivates the use of projection-based reduced order modeling (ROM). However, the transport-dominated and dispersive nature of guided waves challenges static linear subspaces. In addition, preserving the Hamiltonian structure of the equations for energy conservation necessitates dedicated projection techniques. While the Dynamical Low Rank Approximation (DLRA) has proven effective for other wave equations, its application to elastic guided waves in SHM has remained unexplored. In this work, we introduce a structure-preserving parametric ROM framework that leverages the DLRA in an off-line/on-line strategy. During the off-line stage, a time-dependent symplectic reduced basis is constructed from training simulations. For a simplified class of parameter dependencies, we derive a closed-form solution of the nonlinear basis evolution equation. This analytical result yields a closed-form, energy-preserving reduced propagator during wave propagation, eliminating on-line time integration after the loading phase. We validate our approach on a 2D elasticity problem featuring dispersive guided waves interacting with a damage. The results demonstrate high compression ratios (rank $\sim 10-30$), low full field reconstruction errors ($\sim 10^{-3}-10^{-2}$), speedups of two to three orders of magnitude, and excellent long-time energy conservation.

AI.tldr: 提出基于动态低秩近似的保结构降阶框架，实现弹性导波高效高精度仿真。
AI.translated_summary: 弹性导波广泛应用于结构健康监测（SHM）。在多次查询场景中，高保真仿真的计算成本促使了基于投影的降阶模型（ROM）的使用。然而，导波的输运主导和色散特性对静态线性子空间构成了挑战。此外，保持方程的哈密顿结构以实现能量守恒需要专门的投影技术。虽然动态低秩近似（DLRA）在其他波动方程中已被证明有效，但其在SHM中弹性导波方面的应用仍未被探索。在本工作中，我们引入了一个保结构参数化ROM框架，该框架在离线/在线策略中利用了DLRA。在离线阶段，从训练仿真中构建时变辛降阶基。对于一类简化的参数依赖关系，我们推导出非线性基演化方程的闭式解。这一解析结果在波传播阶段产生了闭式的、保能量的降阶传播子，从而消除了加载阶段后的在线时间积分。我们在一个具有色散导波与损伤相互作用的二维弹性问题上验证了我们的方法。结果表明，该方法具有高压缩比（秩约为10-30）、低全场重构误差（约为10^-3-10^-2）、两到三个数量级的加速以及优异的长时间能量守恒性能。
AI.research_problem: 弹性导波的高保真仿真在多次查询场景中计算成本高昂，而现有降阶模型难以处理导波的输运主导和色散特性，同时保持哈密顿结构的能量守恒；DLRA在SHM弹性导波中的应用尚未被探索。
AI.key_innovation: 提出基于动态低秩近似（DLRA）的保结构参数化降阶框架，利用离线/在线策略构建时变辛降阶基，并对简化参数依赖推导出非线性基演化方程的闭式解，从而消除加载阶段后的在线时间积分。
AI.motivation: 结构健康监测中弹性导波仿真在多次查询场景下计算代价过高，需要高效降阶模型；但导波的色散和输运特性以及能量守恒要求使得传统静态线性子空间方法难以适用。
AI.method: 采用离线/在线策略：离线阶段从训练仿真构建时变辛降阶基；针对简化参数依赖推导非线性基演化方程的闭式解，得到保能量的闭式降阶传播子，无需在线时间积分。
AI.experiments: 在具有色散导波与损伤相互作用的二维弹性问题上进行验证。
AI.result: 实现高压缩比（秩约10-30）、低全场重构误差（约10^-3-10^-2）、两到三个数量级加速以及优异的长时间能量守恒。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的保结构DLRA降阶框架能够有效解决弹性导波仿真中的计算效率与能量守恒问题，在精度、压缩比和加速方面表现优异。
AI.limitations: 闭式解仅针对简化的参数依赖关系推导，更一般的参数依赖情形尚未涉及。

title: NIVA: A Multimodal Foundation Model for Actionable Earth System Intelligence
summary: Recent advances in AI-driven weather and climate modeling have improved forecast skill while reducing computational cost. However, existing data-driven approaches are limited in their ability to model coupled Earth system dynamics, which is required for extending predictability beyond the ~2-week horizon. To address this, we introduce NIVA, a multimodal foundation model designed to learn unified representations across Earth system components. While the full framework targets atmosphere, ocean, ice, and land interactions, we focus here on a two-modality setting (ocean and atmosphere) as a controlled proof of concept to evaluate whether foundation models can learn coupled dynamics. Trained on large-scale Earth system simulations, NIVA learns physically meaningful cross-modal structure, providing a foundation for subseasonal-to-seasonal prediction. As initial validation, we show that NIVA captures key modes of climate variability through accurate prediction of major climate indices.

AI.tldr: NIVA多模态基础模型通过学习海洋-大气耦合动力学，为次季节至季节预测奠定基础。
AI.translated_summary: 人工智能驱动的天气和气候建模的最新进展在提高预报技能的同时降低了计算成本。然而，现有的数据驱动方法在模拟耦合地球系统动力学方面的能力有限，而这一能力对于将可预测性延伸至约两周以上是必需的。为解决这一问题，我们提出了NIVA，一个旨在学习跨地球系统组分统一表示的多模态基础模型。虽然完整框架面向大气、海洋、冰和陆地相互作用，但本文聚焦于双模态设定（海洋和大气），作为受控的概念验证，以评估基础模型能否学习耦合动力学。在大规模地球系统模拟数据上训练后，NIVA学习到了具有物理意义的跨模态结构，为次季节至季节预测奠定了基础。作为初步验证，我们表明NIVA能够通过对主要气候指数的准确预测来捕捉气候变率的关键模态。
AI.research_problem: 现有数据驱动的天气与气候模型无法有效模拟耦合地球系统动力学，限制了可预测性超越约两周的时间范围。
AI.key_innovation: 提出NIVA多模态基础模型，能够跨地球系统组分学习统一表示，并学习具有物理意义的跨模态耦合结构。
AI.motivation: 突破现有AI天气模型仅能预测约两周以内的局限，通过建模耦合地球系统动力学来延长可预测性至次季节至季节尺度。
AI.method: 构建多模态基础模型NIVA，在大规模地球系统模拟数据上训练，以海洋-大气双模态设定作为概念验证，学习跨模态耦合动力学表示。
AI.experiments: 在海洋-大气双模态设定下训练NIVA，并通过预测主要气候指数来验证其捕捉气候变率关键模态的能力。
AI.result: NIVA成功学习到具有物理意义的跨模态结构，并能准确预测主要气候指数，有效捕捉气候变率的关键模态。
AI.conclusion: NIVA证明了基础模型具备学习耦合地球系统动力学的能力，为次季节至季节预测奠定了基础。
AI.limitations: 目前仅以海洋-大气双模态作为概念验证，尚未扩展至完整的大气-海洋-冰-陆地四模态框架；验证仍属初步阶段。

title: Uncertainty-aware tree height change regression
summary: Monitoring canopy height change is essential for understanding carbon sinks and forest dynamics. Remote sensing enables consistent, large-scale observations of such changes, increasingly integrated with deep learning architectures such as Geospatial Foundation Models (GFMs). However, existing methods and datasets frame the problem as binary change detection, which overlooks both the continuous nature of change, especially for vegetation, and the inherent uncertainty in labels. We present the Canopy Height Change (CHC) dataset, providing 3 $\mathrm{m}$ resolution continuous canopy height differences and associated spatially resolved uncertainties across 10598 $\mathrm{km}^2$ of northern and western Spain. The dataset is paired with a co-located time series of PlanetScope satellite imagery. Based on the dataset, we introduce the task of uncertainty-aware change regression, associated metrics and strategies for fine-tuning GFMs. Furthermore, we evaluate state-of-the-art GFMs and highlight promising directions and remaining challenges for advancing continuous canopy height change estimation.

AI.tldr: 提出CHC数据集与不确定性感知变化回归任务，推动连续林冠高度变化估计
AI.translated_summary: 监测林冠高度变化对于理解碳汇和森林动态至关重要。遥感技术能够对此类变化进行一致的大尺度观测，并日益与地理空间基础模型（GFMs）等深度学习架构相结合。然而，现有方法和数据集将该问题构建为二元变化检测，既忽略了变化的连续性（尤其是植被的变化），也忽略了标签中固有的不确定性。我们提出了林冠高度变化（CHC）数据集，提供了覆盖西班牙北部和西部10598平方公里的3米分辨率连续林冠高度差值及其相关的空间分辨不确定性。该数据集配以共定位的PlanetScope卫星影像时间序列。基于该数据集，我们引入了不确定性感知变化回归任务、相关评估指标以及GFMs微调策略。此外，我们评估了当前最先进的GFMs，并指出了推进连续林冠高度变化估计的有前景方向和剩余挑战。
AI.research_problem: 现有遥感变化检测方法和数据集将林冠高度变化建模为二元变化检测，忽略了植被变化的连续性以及标签中固有的不确定性，无法满足精细化的森林动态监测需求。
AI.key_innovation: 构建了首个提供3米分辨率连续林冠高度差值及空间分辨不确定性的CHC数据集，并提出了不确定性感知变化回归任务及配套评估指标与GFM微调策略。
AI.motivation: 林冠高度变化是理解碳汇和森林动态的关键指标，遥感与深度学习的结合为大尺度监测提供了可能，但现有二元变化检测范式无法捕捉连续变化和标签不确定性，亟需新的数据集和任务定义来填补这一空白。
AI.method: 构建覆盖西班牙北部和西部10598平方公里的CHC数据集，包含3米分辨率连续林冠高度差值及空间分辨不确定性，配以共定位PlanetScope影像时间序列；在此基础上定义不确定性感知变化回归任务，设计评估指标和GFMs微调策略。
AI.experiments: 基于CHC数据集对当前最先进的地理空间基础模型进行评估，验证其在连续林冠高度变化回归任务中的表现。
AI.result: 评估揭示了现有GFMs在该任务中的表现，并识别出推进连续林冠高度变化估计的有前景方向和仍存在的挑战。
AI.conclusion: CHC数据集和不确定性感知变化回归任务为连续林冠高度变化估计提供了新的基准，但仍有若干挑战需要后续研究解决。
AI.limitations: 数据集仅覆盖西班牙北部和西部区域，地理泛化能力有待验证；摘要未详述具体模型性能数值；不确定性建模方法的有效性仍需进一步验证。

title: Introduction to Stochastic Differential Equations for Generative Machine Learning: A Variational Perspective
summary: The use of ordinary and stochastic differential equations has led to substantial progress in generative machine learning with applications to, for example, image, video and biomolecule generation. This paper provides a self-contained and informal introduction to the differential equations, the probabilistic framework for using them in generative modeling and the Fokker--Planck equation that governs the temporal evolution of the marginal distribution of the stochastic variables of the differential equations. The variational lower bound on the log-likelihood (the evidence lower bound, ELBO) is derived and used as a general starting point for a discussion of diffusion models, score matching, and flow matching. All of these approaches may be viewed as specific parameterizations of the most general variational approach. A one-dimensional density modeling problem is used as a simple example to compare different parameterizations.

AI.tldr: 本文自包含地介绍微分方程在生成式建模中的应用，将扩散模型、分数匹配与流匹配统一为变分方法的参数化。
AI.translated_summary: 常微分方程和随机微分方程的应用推动了生成式机器学习的重大进展，例如在图像、视频和生物分子生成中的应用。本文提供了一个自包含且非正式的介绍，涵盖微分方程、将其用于生成式建模的概率框架，以及控制微分方程中随机变量边际分布时间演化的Fokker-Planck方程。本文推导了对数似然的变分下界（证据下界，ELBO），并将其作为讨论扩散模型、分数匹配和流匹配的一般出发点。所有这些方法都可以被视为最一般变分方法的特定参数化。本文使用一维密度建模问题作为简单示例，比较了不同的参数化方式。
AI.research_problem: 生成式机器学习中扩散模型、分数匹配和流匹配等方法缺乏统一的理论框架与自包含的入门介绍，初学者难以理解它们之间的内在联系。
AI.key_innovation: 将扩散模型、分数匹配和流匹配统一视为最一般变分方法的特定参数化，并以ELBO作为共同出发点进行系统性讨论与比较。
AI.motivation: 微分方程在生成式机器学习中取得了显著进展，但相关理论分散于不同方法中，需要一个自包含的统一介绍来阐明其共同基础。
AI.method: 推导对数似然的变分下界（ELBO），介绍Fokker-Planck方程和概率框架，将多种生成建模方法统一表述为一般变分方法的不同参数化形式。
AI.experiments: 使用一维密度建模问题作为简单示例，比较不同参数化方式的效果。
AI.result: 展示了扩散模型、分数匹配和流匹配均可纳入统一的变分框架，作为一般方法的特定参数化加以理解。
AI.conclusion: 这些主流生成式建模方法可在统一的变分和微分方程框架下理解与比较，为理论分析提供了清晰的基础。
AI.limitations: 仅使用一维示例进行说明，未涉及高维或大规模实际应用的验证。

title: Topological Data Analysis for High-Dimensional Dynamic Process Monitoring
summary: Real-time process monitoring requires methods that extract actionable information from high-dimensional time-series data. In this work, we present a new approach for process monitoring that combines tools of topological data analysis (TDA) and machine learning. In the proposed approach, we represent multivariate time-series data as manifolds and use topological descriptors to summarize the structure of such data; we then use a neural ordinary differential equation to learn the dynamic evolution of the topological structure of the system. Using real data from an industrial process, we show that this trajectory-based event detection approach is effective at detecting diverse types of events. We contrast this approach against reconstruction-based approaches such as principal component analysis and autoencoders and against a trajectory-based approach that uses Koopman autoencoders.

AI.tldr: 结合拓扑数据分析与神经ODE学习拓扑演化，实现工业过程事件检测。
AI.translated_summary: 实时过程监测需要从高维时间序列数据中提取可操作信息的方法。在本研究中，我们提出了一种结合拓扑数据分析（TDA）和机器学习的过程监测新方法。在所提出的方法中，我们将多变量时间序列数据表示为流形，并使用拓扑描述子来总结此类数据的结构；然后我们使用神经常微分方程来学习系统拓扑结构的动态演化。利用来自工业过程的真实数据，我们表明这种基于轨迹的事件检测方法能够有效检测多种类型的事件。我们将该方法与基于重构的方法（如主成分分析和自编码器）以及使用Koopman自编码器的基于轨迹的方法进行了对比。
AI.research_problem: 实时过程监测中如何从高维时间序列数据中有效提取可操作信息以检测事件，现有方法在捕捉数据拓扑结构的动态演化方面存在不足。
AI.key_innovation: 将多变量时间序列数据表示为流形，用拓扑描述子总结其结构，并通过神经常微分方程学习拓扑结构的动态演化轨迹，实现基于轨迹的事件检测。
AI.motivation: 实时过程监测需要从高维时间序列数据中提取可操作信息，现有方法在捕捉数据结构动态演化方面存在局限。
AI.method: 将多变量时间序列数据表示为流形，使用拓扑描述子总结数据结构，利用神经常微分方程学习拓扑结构的动态演化，基于轨迹进行事件检测。
AI.experiments: 使用工业过程的真实数据，检测多种类型的事件，并与主成分分析、自编码器及Koopman自编码器方法进行对比。
AI.result: 该基于轨迹的事件检测方法在真实工业数据上能有效检测多种类型的事件。
AI.conclusion: 结合拓扑数据分析与神经常微分方程的方法为实时过程监测提供了一种有效的事件检测途径。

title: A Path-Space Formulation of Prediction in World Models: From a Single Action to Prediction, Planning, and Irreversibility
summary: We propose a path-space formulation of prediction in AI world models. Rather than sequences of one-step conditional distributions, we argue that a world model implicitly defines a probability measure over future trajectories. In the local regime where latent dynamics admit an effective Markovian description, this path measure takes the Onsager-Machlup form. Within this framework, prediction (most probable trajectory), planning (constrained optimization), and uncertainty (fluctuations) emerge as operations on a single action functional. We decompose the latent dynamics into reversible and irreversible components and introduce operational measures of entropy production from model rollouts. In controlled small-scale attention-based models, we find that attention asymmetry is acquired during training in proportion to the irreversibility of the data. Symmetrizing the learned attention suppresses entropy production and selectively degrades long-horizon prediction of irreversible dynamics while preserving relaxational prediction. These results suggest that irreversibility may serve as a computational resource for predictive world models. More generally, the fundamental predictive object is a distribution over future paths rather than states.

AI.tldr: 不可逆性是世界模型预测的计算资源，预测对象应是路径分布而非状态。
AI.translated_summary: 我们提出了一种AI世界模型预测的路径空间表述。我们认为，世界模型隐式地定义了未来轨迹上的概率测度，而非一步条件分布的序列。在潜在动力学允许有效马尔可夫描述的局部区域中，该路径测度取Onsager-Machlup形式。在这一框架下，预测（最可能轨迹）、规划（约束优化）和不确定性（涨落）均作为对单一作用泛函的操作而涌现。我们将潜在动力学分解为可逆和不可逆分量，并引入了从模型推演中产生的熵产生的操作性度量。在受控的小规模基于注意力的模型中，我们发现注意力不对称性在训练过程中以与数据的不可逆性成正比的方式获得。对称化学习到的注意力会抑制熵产生，并选择性地降低不可逆动力学的长时程预测能力，同时保持弛豫预测。这些结果表明，不可逆性可以作为预测世界模型的计算资源。更一般地，基本的预测对象是未来路径上的分布而非状态。
AI.research_problem: 现有AI世界模型将预测视为一步条件分布的序列，缺乏对未来轨迹整体概率结构的统一理论框架，无法将预测、规划和不确定性纳入统一的数学描述。
AI.key_innovation: 提出世界模型预测的路径空间表述，将预测、规划和不确定性统一为对单一作用泛函的操作，并将潜在动力学分解为可逆与不可逆分量以量化熵产生。
AI.motivation: 世界模型隐式定义了未来轨迹上的概率测度，但现有方法缺乏对此路径结构的理论理解，需要统一框架来连接预测、规划与不确定性。
AI.method: 基于Onsager-Machlup形式的路径测度框架，将潜在动力学分解为可逆和不可逆分量，引入熵产生的操作性度量，并在小规模注意力模型上进行实验验证。
AI.experiments: 在受控的小规模基于注意力的模型上训练，分析注意力不对称性的获取与数据不可逆性的关系，并通过对称化注意力进行消融实验。
AI.result: 注意力不对称性在训练中与数据不可逆性成正比地获得；对称化注意力抑制熵产生，选择性地降低不可逆动力学的长时程预测能力，同时保持弛豫预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 不可逆性可作为预测世界模型的计算资源；基本的预测对象是未来路径上的分布而非状态。
AI.limitations: 实验仅在受控的小规模模型上进行，大规模世界模型的适用性尚未验证。

title: Far-field spatial coherence driven by lossy objects: first-principles approach unifying scattering of quantum light and thermal emission
summary: Far-field spatial coherence dictates the interference properties of scattered light and thermal emission. Traditionally, these phenomena are treated through disjointed paradigms: classical scattering descriptions assume cold objects lacking quantum fluctuations, idealized quantum scattering schemes ignore dissipation, and semiclassical fluctuational electrodynamics relies on phenomenological noise currents, precluding the consistent treatment of incident quantum states. Here, we develop a first-principles framework based on the modified Langevin noise formalism to unify the scattering of quantum light and the intrinsic thermal emission of finite dissipative objects. We demonstrate that the outgoing far-field spatial coherence separates into an algebraic superposition of two geometry-driven mechanisms, coupled by the global unitarity of the radiation-matter dynamics. The first mechanism, elastic scattering, acts as a non-unitary spatial filter, mode-selectively attenuating and reshaping incident quantum correlations. The second mechanism, thermal emission, originates from localized material dissipation and projects the object's absorption profile into the far field, providing a quantum-vectorial derivation of the macroscopic van Cittert-Zernike theorem. Applying this framework across optical regimes, we determine operational bounds for lossy quantum photonics. Under chaotic thermal illumination, we analytically demonstrate thermal cloaking at equilibrium and show that a passive sink casts a structured thermal shadow geometrically identical to a primary emitter. Under coherent illumination, we derive a thermodynamic phase diagram bounding macroscopic phase correlations, demonstrating that subwavelength nanostructures undergo substantial coherence degradation compared to bulk objects. Finally, under spatially entangled illumination...

AI.tldr: 基于修正朗之万噪声形式统一量子光散射与热发射的第一性原理框架。
AI.translated_summary: 远场空间相干性决定了散射光和热发射的干涉特性。传统上，这些现象通过相互割裂的范式来处理：经典散射描述假设物体为缺乏量子涨落的冷物体，理想化的量子散射方案忽略耗散，而半经典涨落电动力学依赖唯象噪声电流，无法一致地处理入射量子态。本文基于修正的朗之万噪声形式体系，发展了一个第一性原理框架，统一了量子光的散射与有限耗散物体的本征热发射。我们证明，出射远场空间相干性分离为两种几何驱动机制的代数叠加，二者通过辐射-物质动力学的全局幺正性耦合。第一种机制是弹性散射，作为非幺正空间滤波器，模式选择性地衰减和重塑入射量子关联。第二种机制是热发射，源于局域材料耗散，将物体的吸收轮廓投影到远场，为宏观van Cittert-Zernike定理提供了量子矢量推导。将该框架应用于不同光学体系，我们确定了有损量子光子学的操作界限。在混沌热照明下，我们解析地证明了平衡态下的热隐身，并表明无源汇投射出与初级发射体几何上相同的结构化热影。在相干照明下，我们推导了约束宏观相位关联的热力学相图，证明亚波长纳米结构相比体相物体经历显著的相干性退化。最后，在空间纠缠照明下……
AI.research_problem: 经典散射、量子散射和半经典涨落电动力学三种范式相互割裂，无法一致地同时处理入射量子态的散射与有限耗散物体的本征热发射。
AI.key_innovation: 基于修正朗之万噪声形式体系的第一性原理框架，将远场空间相干性分解为弹性散射（非幺正空间滤波）与热发射（局域耗散投影）两种几何驱动机制的代数叠加，并通过辐射-物质动力学的全局幺正性耦合。
AI.motivation: 远场空间相干性决定散射光与热发射的干涉特性，但现有理论范式各自存在根本性局限，缺乏统一描述量子光散射与物体本征热发射的一致性框架。
AI.method: 基于修正朗之万噪声形式体系构建第一性原理理论框架，将出射远场空间相干性分解为弹性散射和热发射两种机制，并分别应用于混沌热照明、相干照明和空间纠缠照明等光学条件进行解析推导。
AI.experiments: 本研究为理论工作，通过解析推导在不同照明条件下验证框架的预测能力，包括热平衡隐身、热力学相图推导及亚波长结构相干性分析。
AI.result: 在混沌热照明下解析证明了平衡态热隐身，且无源汇投射出与初级发射体几何相同的结构化热影；在相干照明下推导出约束宏观相位关联的热力学相图，发现亚波长纳米结构相比体相物体相干性显著退化。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功统一了量子光散射与有限耗散物体热发射的描述，揭示了两种几何驱动机制及其幺正耦合关系，为有损量子光子学确定了操作界限。

title: Training-Free Debiasing of Diffusion Models via CLIP-Guided Denoising Optimization
summary: Text-to-image diffusion models achieve impressive visual quality, yet demographic bias remains a challenge, as neutral prompts consistently produce stereotypical representations across gender and race. Existing approaches remain limited by costly retraining or by inference-time interventions that often degrade image quality and semantic alignment. We propose Text Embedding Steering (TES), a training-free framework that mitigates demographic bias by directly optimizing conditional text embeddings during the diffusion process. We show that a two-stage strategy - early-stage global alignment followed by iterative denoising-time refinement with CLIP-based feedback - enables stable and controllable attribute steering without modifying model parameters. Extensive experiments on Stable Diffusion demonstrate that TES outperforms existing training-free baselines in fairness while maintaining competitive image quality. These results highlight that inference-time text embedding optimization is a practical and scalable solution for fairness-aware generation in diffusion models.

AI.tldr: 提出无需训练的文本嵌入引导框架TES，通过优化条件文本嵌入缓解扩散模型的人口统计学偏差。
AI.translated_summary: 文本到图像扩散模型在视觉质量上取得了令人瞩目的成就，但人口统计学偏差仍然是一个挑战，因为中性提示词在性别和种族方面始终产生刻板印象式的表征。现有方法受限于昂贵的重新训练，或在推理时进行干预但往往会降低图像质量和语义对齐。我们提出文本嵌入引导（Text Embedding Steering, TES），一种无需训练的框架，通过在扩散过程中直接优化条件文本嵌入来缓解人口统计学偏差。我们表明，两阶段策略——早期阶段全局对齐，随后利用基于CLIP的反馈进行迭代去噪时细化——能够在不修改模型参数的情况下实现稳定且可控的属性引导。在Stable Diffusion上的大量实验表明，TES在公平性方面优于现有的无需训练基线方法，同时保持具有竞争力的图像质量。这些结果凸显了推理时文本嵌入优化是扩散模型中公平感知生成的实用且可扩展的解决方案。
AI.research_problem: 文本到图像扩散模型在中性提示词下持续产生性别和种族方面的刻板印象表征，而现有去偏方法要么需要昂贵的重新训练，要么在推理时干预会损害图像质量和语义对齐。
AI.key_innovation: 提出文本嵌入引导（TES）框架，在扩散过程中直接优化条件文本嵌入而非修改模型参数，采用两阶段策略（早期全局对齐+基于CLIP反馈的迭代去噪细化）实现无需训练的属性引导。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型存在显著的人口统计学偏差，现有去偏方法成本高或会降低生成质量，需要一种无需训练且不损害图像质量的公平感知生成方案。
AI.method: TES框架在扩散过程中直接优化条件文本嵌入，采用两阶段策略：早期阶段进行全局对齐，随后利用基于CLIP的反馈进行迭代去噪时细化，无需修改模型参数。
AI.experiments: 在Stable Diffusion上进行大量实验，与现有无需训练的基线方法在公平性和图像质量方面进行对比评估。
AI.result: TES在公平性方面优于现有无需训练的基线方法，同时保持具有竞争力的图像质量。
AI.conclusion: 推理时文本嵌入优化是扩散模型中公平感知生成的实用且可扩展的解决方案。

title: Who Plays Which Role When? Communication Role Dynamics for Peer Recognition and Team Performance Prediction
summary: Team roles offer an interpretable lens on collaboration, yet computational studies of roles often rely on domain-specific personas or data-driven clustering rather than theory-grounded taxonomies. We operationalize a taxonomy of eight communication roles grounded in education literature and annotate a corpus of 6,307 Slack messages from 55 students across 18 teams in a semester-long computer science course project. We evaluate whether LLMs can approximate expert labels, enabling scalable, taxonomy-driven role annotation. Using these role labels, we characterize role dynamics over teams' lifecycles, finding that different roles peak at different moments and that students enact a more diverse set of roles as projects progress. To evaluate the utility of our role constructs, we use them to predict peer recognition, outperforming lexical, conversational, and LLM-prompting baselines. To assess generalizability beyond the educational context, we apply the same role constructs to a public dataset (DeliData) to predict team performance improvement after deliberation, again exceeding prior performance.

AI.tldr: 基于教育文献的八类沟通角色分类法，利用LLM实现可扩展的角色标注，并预测团队认可度与绩效提升。
AI.translated_summary: 团队角色为理解协作提供了一个可解释的视角，然而关于角色的计算研究通常依赖于特定领域的人物画像或数据驱动的聚类，而非基于理论的分类体系。我们将教育文献中提出的八种沟通角色分类体系加以操作化，并对一个包含6,307条Slack消息的语料库进行标注，该语料库来自一个学期长的计算机科学课程项目中18个团队的55名学生。我们评估了大语言模型（LLM）能否逼近专家标注的标签，从而实现可扩展的、由分类体系驱动的角色标注。利用这些角色标签，我们刻画了团队生命周期中的角色动态变化，发现不同角色在不同的时间点达到峰值，并且随着项目的推进，学生所扮演的角色集合更加多样化。为了评估我们角色构念的实用性，我们使用它们来预测同伴认可度，其表现优于词汇、对话和LLM提示基线方法。为了评估在教育情境之外的泛化能力，我们将相同的角色构念应用于公开数据集（DeliData），以预测团队在讨论后的绩效提升，同样超越了已有方法的性能。
AI.research_problem: 团队角色的计算研究缺乏基于理论的分类体系，现有方法多依赖领域特定的人物画像或数据驱动的聚类，难以实现可解释且可推广的角色分析。
AI.key_innovation: 提出将教育文献中的八种沟通角色分类体系操作化，并利用LLM逼近专家标注，实现可扩展的、理论驱动的角色自动标注。
AI.motivation: 团队角色是理解协作的可解释视角，但缺乏理论支撑的计算方法限制了角色分析的可扩展性和可推广性，因此需要一种基于理论分类体系的自动化角色标注方案。
AI.method: 基于教育文献定义八种沟通角色，对6,307条Slack消息进行专家标注；评估LLM对专家标签的逼近能力；利用角色标签分析团队生命周期中的角色动态；以角色构念预测同伴认可度和团队绩效提升。
AI.experiments: 在18个团队、55名学生的计算机科学课程项目Slack语料上进行角色标注与LLM评估；以角色构念预测同伴认可度，与词汇、对话及LLM提示基线对比；在公开数据集DeliData上预测讨论后团队绩效提升以验证泛化性。
AI.result: LLM能够较好地逼近专家角色标签；不同角色在团队生命周期中于不同时间达到峰值，学生随项目推进扮演更多样化的角色；角色构念在预测同伴认可度和团队绩效提升方面均超越基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于理论的沟通角色分类体系可通过LLM实现可扩展的自动标注，并在预测同伴认可度和团队绩效提升方面具有实用价值，且可推广至教育以外的情境。

collection_reason: supplemental query: (ti:learning OR abs:learning OR ti:neural OR abs:neural OR ti:"machine learning" OR abs:"machine learning") AND (ti:dynamics OR abs:dynamics OR ti:dynamical OR abs:dynamical)
title: Ai2-Kit: Streamlining AI-Accelerated Ab Initio Workflows for Complex Chemical Systems
comment: 24 pages, 11 figures. Submitted to Chemical Science
summary: Molecular simulations of complex chemical systems, such as catalysis, electrochemistry, and energy storage, often need to capture the interplay of effects such as electronic structure, finite-temperature fluctuations, and electric-field response. Such complexity is difficult to address with traditional ab initio calculations, which are limited by the time and length scales they can reach. AI-accelerated ab initio (AI2) methods use machine learning potentials trained on first-principles data to replace expensive electronic-structure calculations, extending ab initio accuracy to these regimes, but their routine application requires reliable workflows that connect first-principles calculations, model training, molecular dynamics, enhanced sampling, trajectory analysis, and HPC orchestration. Here we present ai2-kit, a software toolkit for developing accessible, reproducible, and extensible AI2 workflows. ai2-kit provides high-semantic-density command-line interfaces and Python APIs for structure and dataset conversion, batch task generation, active-learning screening, job orchestration, and workflow recovery. We demonstrate ai2-kit in four representative applications: active-learning-based machine learning potential construction, free-energy perturbation for redox and acid-base processes, electrochemical machine learning potentials for electrified interfaces, and spectroscopies from machine learning molecular dynamics. ai2-kit also provides AI-agent skills that help users adapt these use cases into customized workflows for their own chemical systems and computational software stacks. Together, ai2-kit helps turn AI2 methods from bespoke computational protocols into reusable and extensible workflows for complex chemical systems, from model construction to property prediction.

AI.tldr: ai2-kit工具包将AI加速从头计算方法转化为可复用、可扩展的复杂化学体系工作流。

title: Work Statistics Under Quantum-Jump and Quench Dynamics in Monitored Ising Chains
summary: We investigate work statistics in monitored transverse-field Ising chains subject to both a quantum quench of the transverse field and either stochastic quantum jumps or controlled measurement sequences. For generalized measurements, we derive a trajectory-resolved generating function for work statistics in the two-point energy measurement scheme. Evaluating it using a fermionic Gaussian-state formalism, we show that, under stochastic jump dynamics, the work distribution crosses over from a comb-like structure to an essentially Gaussian form with shrinking sub-Gaussian tails, as the number of detection events grows. For controlled jump protocols, the energy added by each jump is constant when successive jumps are causally disconnected but decreases and then saturates when they lie within each other's light cone, yielding linear and sublinear growth of the average work, respectively. For monitored quenches, continuous observation washes out the fine structure of the isolated-quench distribution and again drives the statistics toward Gaussian behavior.

AI.tldr: 受监测伊辛链中，量子跳跃与连续测量驱动功统计从梳状结构趋向高斯分布。
AI.translated_summary: 我们研究了受监测横向场伊辛链在横向场量子猝灭以及随机量子跳跃或受控测量序列作用下的功统计。对于广义测量，我们在两点能量测量方案中推导了轨迹分辨的功统计生成函数。利用费米子高斯态形式进行计算，我们发现在随机跳跃动力学下，随着探测事件数量增加，功分布从梳状结构转变为基本高斯形式，且亚高斯尾逐渐缩小。对于受控跳跃协议，当连续跳跃因果断开时，每次跳跃添加的能量是恒定的；当它们处于彼此的光锥内时，能量先减少后饱和，分别导致平均功的线性和亚线性增长。对于受监测的猝灭，连续观测消除了孤立猝灭分布的精细结构，并再次驱动统计量趋向高斯行为。

title: Well-posedness and stationary distribution of free stochastic differential equations
summary: This paper studies free stochastic differential equations driven by free Brownian motion. Under local operator Lipschitz and Lyapunov-type conditions on the coefficients, we prove the global well-posedness of solutions in the noncommutative probability setting using free Itô calculus. We further establish the existence and uniqueness of stationary solutions under appropriate dissipativity conditions. Our results extend classical theory to the free probability framework.

title: P-K-GCN: Physics-augmented Koopman-enhanced Graph Convolutional Network for Deep Spatiotemporal Super-resolution
summary: High-fidelity simulation of spatiotemporal dynamics is computationally prohibitive, necessitating efficient super-resolution techniques to reconstruct high-resolution data from coarse-grained inputs. Traditional data-driven methods often lack physical constraints, and simple physics-informed learning struggles with irregular spatial geometries and intricately evolving temporal dynamics. To tackle these challenges, we propose a Physics-augmented Koopman-enhanced Graph Convolutional Network (P-K-GCN) for spatiotemporal super-resolution on irregular geometries. Specifically, a continuous spline-based GCN is first designed to extract spatial dependencies directly from coarse graph, and Koopman operator theory is incorporated to project the nonlinear dynamics into a compact latent space where temporal progression is linearized. Second, we augment the optimization objective with a physics-based loss to force the data-driven reconstructions to adhere to physical laws for improving predictive fidelity and robustness. Finally, we provide a rigorous theoretical analysis, establishing that the physics augmentation and Koopman regularization mathematically guarantees a reduction in super-resolution error by diminishing Rademacher complexity and tightening generalization bounds. We evaluate our framework on reconstructing spatially high-resolution cardiac electrodynamics across a 3D heart geometry from sparse low-resolution measurements. Numerical experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior accuracy compared to baseline models.

AI.tldr: 提出P-K-GCN网络，融合物理约束与Koopman算子，实现不规则几何上的时空超分辨率重建。
AI.translated_summary: 高保真时空动力学模拟的计算成本极高，需要高效的超分辨率技术从粗粒度输入中重建高分辨率数据。传统数据驱动方法通常缺乏物理约束，而简单的物理信息学习在处理不规则空间几何和复杂演化的时间动力学方面存在困难。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种物理增强的Koopman增强图卷积网络（P-K-GCN），用于不规则几何上的时空超分辨率。具体而言，首先设计了一种基于连续样条的GCN，直接从粗粒度图中提取空间依赖关系，并引入Koopman算子理论将非线性动力学投影到紧凑的潜在空间中，使时间演化线性化。其次，我们在优化目标中增加基于物理的损失函数，迫使数据驱动的重建遵循物理定律，以提高预测保真度和鲁棒性。最后，我们提供了严格的理论分析，证明物理增强和Koopman正则化通过降低Rademacher复杂度和收紧泛化界，在数学上保证了超分辨率误差的减少。我们在3D心脏几何结构上评估了该框架，从稀疏低分辨率测量中重建空间高分辨率心脏电动力学。数值实验表明，与基线模型相比，我们的方法实现了更高的精度。
AI.research_problem: 高保真时空动力学模拟计算成本过高；传统数据驱动超分辨率方法缺乏物理约束；简单物理信息学习难以处理不规则空间几何与复杂时间动力学演化。

AI.experiments: 在3D心脏几何结构上，从稀疏低分辨率测量重建空间高分辨率心脏电动力学，与多个基线模型进行对比评估。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该方法相比基线模型实现了更高的重建精度。
AI.conclusion: P-K-GCN通过物理增强与Koopman正则化的协同作用，在不规则几何时空超分辨率任务中有效提升了预测保真度与鲁棒性，并具备理论泛化保证。

title: A Physics-Informed Fourier-Wavelet Transformer for Multiscale Computational Fluid Dynamics Surrogate Modeling
summary: Physics-informed surrogate models can accelerate computational fluid dynamics simulations. However, many existing methods reproduce global flow patterns more reliably than localized multiscale structures. This study presents a physics-informed Fourier-wavelet transformer for next-step velocity-field reconstruction in real-world flow benchmarks. The proposed formulation combines hybrid Fourier-wavelet spectral encoding with physics-biased self-attention based on partial differential equation residual diagnostics. It also uses self-supervised pretraining through Masked Physics Prediction and Equation Consistency Prediction. The experiments are conducted on two real benchmark cases: cylinder-wake flow and fluid-structure interaction. All approaches are evaluated under a shared local protocol and compared with spectral, transformer-based, operator-learning, and physics-informed neural-network baselines. On the cylinder-wake benchmark, the proposed model achieves the best aggregate accuracy, with an all-channel normalized mean-squared error of 0.05875 and an all-channel Pearson correlation coefficient of 0.97019. On the fluid-structure-interaction benchmark, it gives the lowest all-channel normalized mean-squared error of $2.70 \times 10^{-4}$, compared with $4.02 \times 10^{-4}$ for the strongest baseline. Component-wise field comparisons and scale-separated diagnostics further show stronger recovery of localized wake structures, including near-body, wake-core, and far-wake features. The results demonstrate improved real-world flow reconstruction while maintaining a practical accuracy-cost tradeoff.

AI.tldr: 提出傅里叶-小波变换器结合物理偏置注意力，显著提升局部多尺度流动结构重建精度。
AI.translated_summary: 物理信息代理模型可以加速计算流体力学模拟。然而，许多现有方法在重现全局流动模式方面比局部多尺度结构更为可靠。本研究提出了一种物理信息傅里叶-小波变换器，用于真实流动基准中的下一步速度场重建。所提出的公式将混合傅里叶-小波谱编码与基于偏微分方程残差诊断的物理偏置自注意力机制相结合，并通过掩码物理预测和方程一致性预测进行自监督预训练。实验在两个真实基准案例上进行：圆柱尾流和流固相互作用。所有方法在共享的局部协议下进行评估，并与谱方法、基于变换器的方法、算子学习和物理信息神经网络基线进行比较。在圆柱尾流基准上，所提出的模型实现了最佳的综合精度，全通道归一化均方误差为0.05875，全通道皮尔逊相关系数为0.97019。在流固相互作用基准上，其全通道归一化均方误差最低为2.70×10⁻⁴，而最强基线为4.02×10⁻⁴。逐分量场比较和尺度分离诊断进一步表明，该模型对局部尾流结构（包括近体、尾流核心和远尾流特征）具有更强的恢复能力。结果表明，该模型在保持实用精度-成本权衡的同时，改进了真实流动重建效果。

AI.result: 圆柱尾流基准上全通道归一化均方误差0.05875、皮尔逊相关系数0.97019，综合精度最佳；流固相互作用基准上全通道归一化均方误差2.70×10⁻⁴，优于最强基线的4.02×10⁻⁴。尺度分离诊断显示对近体、尾流核心和远尾流等局部结构恢复能力更强。

title: J-LAW: Joint Localization and Actionable World Modeling via Coupled Latent Factor Graphs
summary: Classical SLAM estimates metric poses and a geometric map but produces no actionable predictive model for planning. Action-conditioned world models learn compact latent dynamics for planning but ignore global metric consistency and accumulate drift under open-loop rollout. We argue these are two views of the same estimation problem and propose J-LAW (Joint Localization and Actionable World Modeling) in this letter: a coupled factor graph that jointly optimizes metric object poses, latent world states, and latent landmark embeddings. The bridge is a pose-conditioned latent encoder and a learned pose--latent coupling factor, so that better localization improves the world model and vice versa. We cast observation, action-conditioned prediction, metric odometry, pose--latent coupling, latent loop closure, and latent landmark observation as probabilistic factors in a single MAP objective. Real-data experiments on PushT and WildGS show that coupled graph correction substantially reduces latent prediction RMSE and endpoint drift relative to open-loop rollout, while latent loop closure improves global trajectory consistency. J-LAW yields a map that is simultaneously metric (poses) and actionable (latent landmarks for planning).

AI.tldr: 提出J-LAW，用耦合因子图联合优化SLAM定位与世界模型，实现度量一致且可规划的地图。

AI.experiments: 在PushT和WildGS两个真实数据集上进行实验，对比开环推演基线，评估潜在预测RMSE、端点漂移和全局轨迹一致性。

title: Robustness of Quantum Discord in Nonequilibrium Electronic Transport through Tunnel-Coupled Quantum Dots
summary: Quantum discord captures quantum correlations beyond entanglement and can remain finite even when the entanglement vanishes. We investigate the transient nonequilibrium dynamics and steady-state behavior of quantum discord and classical correlations in a double quantum dot (DQD) system coupled to fermionic reservoirs. By employing a quantum Langevin equation formalism, we obtain the exact reduced density matrix of the system, enabling a comprehensive analysis of its quantum and classical correlations under nonequilibrium conditions. The influence of system-reservoir coupling strength, spectral bandwidth, thermal bias, and varying initial state on both the transient dynamics and steady-state correlations is systematically analyzed. Quantum discord remains finite in the nonequilibrium steady state over a broad parameter range. Although thermal gradients reduce the overall magnitude of correlations, quantum discord persists and exhibits greater resilience. These results demonstrate that nonequilibrium electronic transport, together with the environmental spectral properties and reservoir asymmetry, provides an effective means of controlling nonclassical correlations in mesoscopic systems and establishes quantum discord as a robust hallmark of open fermionic quantum devices.

AI.tldr: 量子失协在双量子点非平衡稳态中保持有限值，可作为开放费米子器件的稳健标志。
AI.translated_summary: 量子失协能够刻画超越纠缠的量子关联，即使在纠缠消失时仍可保持有限值。我们研究了与费米子热库耦合的双量子点（DQD）系统中量子失协和经典关联的瞬态非平衡动力学和稳态行为。通过采用量子朗之万方程形式体系，我们获得了系统的精确约化密度矩阵，从而能够全面分析非平衡条件下系统的量子关联和经典关联。系统分析了系统-热库耦合强度、谱带宽、热偏置以及不同初始状态对瞬态动力学和稳态关联的影响。量子失协在非平衡稳态中于很宽的参数范围内保持有限值。虽然热梯度降低了关联的整体幅度，但量子失协持续存在并表现出更强的韧性。这些结果表明，非平衡电子输运连同环境谱特性和热库不对称性，为控制介观系统中的非经典关联提供了有效手段，并确立了量子失协作为开放费米子量子器件的稳健标志。

title: Joint Medical Image Enhancement and Segmentation with Diffusion-based Symbiotic Information Interaction
summary: Image quality is critical for accurate medical diagnosis. However, MRI, CT, and ultrasound images are often of low resolution and quality due to cost constraints, complicating the visualization of key anatomical structures and lesions. While such limitations are common in practice, traditional methods treat image enhancement as a separate preprocessing step, failing to fully leverage its potential synergy with image segmentation. To address this, we propose DiSIINet (Diffusion-based Symbiotic Information Interaction Network), which is built on the principle that enhancement and segmentation should mutually reinforce each other in a unified model. Based on Denoising Diffusion Implicit Models (DDIM), DiSIINet integrates an enhancement branch and a segmentation branch. These branches interact through a novel Symbiotic Information Interaction (SII) module, which facilitates dynamic, feature-level information exchange via cross-attention during the reverse diffusion process. This design enables both tasks to iteratively improve each other. The DDIM backbone ensures high-quality output and efficient inference through deterministic sampling. Experiments on multi-modal medical datasets (MRI, CT, ultrasound) show that DiSIINet achieves significant performance improvements compared to sequential or independent enhancement and segmentation approaches. The code is available at: https://github.com/Reconsider80/DiSIINet.

AI.tldr: DiSIINet基于扩散模型统一增强与分割，通过共生信息交互实现两任务协同提升。
AI.translated_summary: 图像质量对于准确的医学诊断至关重要。然而，由于成本限制，MRI、CT和超声图像通常分辨率和质量较低，使得关键解剖结构和病灶的可视化变得复杂。虽然这些限制在实践中很常见，但传统方法将图像增强视为一个独立的预处理步骤，未能充分利用其与图像分割之间的潜在协同作用。为了解决这一问题，我们提出了DiSIINet（基于扩散的共生信息交互网络），其建立在增强和分割应在统一模型中相互增强的原则之上。基于去噪扩散隐式模型（DDIM），DiSIINet集成了一个增强分支和一个分割分支。这些分支通过一个新颖的共生信息交互（SII）模块进行交互，该模块在反向扩散过程中通过交叉注意力促进动态的、特征级的信息交换。这一设计使两个任务能够迭代地相互改进。DDIM主干通过确定性采样确保高质量输出和高效推理。在多模态医学数据集（MRI、CT、超声）上的实验表明，与顺序或独立的增强和分割方法相比，DiSIINet取得了显著的性能提升。代码可在以下地址获取：https://github.com/Reconsider80/DiSIINet。
AI.research_problem: 传统方法将医学图像增强作为独立的预处理步骤，未能与分割任务形成协同，导致低质量MRI、CT和超声图像中的关键解剖结构和病灶难以被有效分割。
AI.key_innovation: 提出共生信息交互（SII）模块，在DDIM反向扩散过程中通过交叉注意力实现增强分支与分割分支之间动态的特征级信息交换，使两任务在统一模型中迭代互促。
AI.motivation: 医学图像（MRI、CT、超声）常因成本限制而分辨率和质量不足，影响诊断准确性；传统将增强与分割分离处理的方式未能利用两者间的协同潜力。
AI.method: 基于DDIM构建DiSIINet，包含增强和分割两个分支，通过SII模块在反向扩散过程中以交叉注意力进行特征级信息交换，利用确定性采样保证高质量输出和高效推理。
AI.experiments: 在多模态医学数据集（MRI、CT、超声）上进行了实验，与顺序处理和独立处理的增强与分割方法进行了对比评估。
AI.result: DiSIINet相比顺序或独立的增强与分割方法取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 将图像增强与分割在统一扩散模型中协同建模，通过共生信息交互实现两任务迭代互促，可有效提升多模态医学图像的分割性能。

title: Analysis of a maximum-entropy based estimator for dynamic random graph models
summary: We study dynamic random graphs in which the set of nodes is fixed, but edges evolve over time according to an underlying stochastic mechanism. Using a maximum-entropy approach, we define a probability distribution on graph trajectories that is consistent with observed constraints, capturing the inherent uncertainty in partially observed networks. We introduce a moment-based estimator for the parameters of this distribution and establish its statistical properties, such as consistency and asymptotic normality, with explicit formulas for the covariance structure. Numerical experiments demonstrate the estimator's accuracy and robustness across various dynamic network scenarios. Our framework bridges probabilistic modeling and statistical inference in time-varying networks, providing practical tools for understanding and predicting complex edge dynamics.

AI.tldr: 基于最大熵方法构建动态随机图轨迹的概率分布，并提出具有一致性和渐近正态性的矩估计量。
AI.translated_summary: 我们研究动态随机图，其中节点集合固定，但边根据底层随机机制随时间演化。利用最大熵方法，我们在图轨迹上定义了一个与观测约束一致的概率分布，以刻画部分观测网络中固有的不确定性。我们为该分布的参数引入了基于矩的估计量，并建立了其统计性质，如一致性和渐近正态性，同时给出了协方差结构的显式公式。数值实验表明，该估计量在多种动态网络场景下具有准确性和鲁棒性。我们的框架将时变网络的概率建模与统计推断联系起来，为理解和预测复杂的边动态提供了实用工具。

AI.motivation: 动态网络中边演化复杂且常存在部分观测的不确定性，需要一种统一的概率建模与统计推断框架来理解和预测边动态。
AI.method: 在固定节点、边随时间演化的动态随机图上，利用最大熵原理构建图轨迹上的概率分布；提出基于矩的参数估计量，并从理论上推导其统计性质。
AI.experiments: 在多种动态网络场景下进行数值实验，验证所提估计量的准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.result: 数值实验表明估计量在多种场景下准确且鲁棒；理论上证明了估计量的一致性与渐近正态性，并给出协方差结构的显式公式。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功将时变网络的概率建模与统计推断相结合，为理解和预测复杂边动态提供了实用工具。

title: Non-Uniqueness for Nonlinear Fokker--Planck Equations and Their Associated Distribution-Dependent SDEs
summary:
In this paper, we study distribution-dependent stochastic differential equations on the domain $\mathcal O=\mathbb T^d$ or $\mathbb R^d$, $d\geq 2$, of the form \begin{align*} {\rm d}X_t = v(t,X_t,ρ_t)\,{\rm d}t + \sqrt{2}\, σ(t,X_t,ρ_t)\,{\rm d}W_t, \qquad ρ_t:=\frac{{\rm d}μ_t}{{\rm d}x}, \end{align*} where $μ_t=\operatorname{Law}(X_t)$. Our main construction is carried out at the level of the associated nonlinear Fokker--Planck equations. We first build non-unique probability solutions to these PDEs and then use the superposition principle to obtain non-unique martingale solutions to the corresponding DDSDEs.
  We establish two main non-uniqueness results concerning stationary states, both on the torus and in the whole space, under the corresponding structural assumptions. First, we construct a divergence-free drift $v\in C_tL^{d-}$ such that the DDSDE admits \emph{infinitely many} distinct solutions starting from the stationary initial density. This result lies at the natural critical regularity threshold: in several models, well-posedness is expected for drifts in $C_tL^{d+}$. Second, for $d\geq 3$ and every prescribed $N\in\mathbb{N}$, we construct a divergence-free drift for which the DDSDE admits at least $N$ distinct stationary martingale solutions. The resulting multiplicity of equilibrium states is reminiscent of multistability and phase-transition phenomena in physical systems.

AI.tldr: 在临界正则性下构造DDSDE的无散度漂移项，实现稳态解的非唯一性与多重性。
AI.translated_summary: 在本文中，我们研究定义在区域$\mathcal O=\mathbb T^d$或$\mathbb R^d$（$d\geq 2$）上的分布依赖随机微分方程，其形式为$dX_t = v(t,X_t,\rho_t)\,dt + \sqrt{2}\,\sigma(t,X_t,\rho_t)\,dW_t$，其中$\rho_t := d\mu_t/dx$，$\mu_t = \operatorname{Law}(X_t)$。我们的主要构造在关联的非线性Fokker--Planck方程层面进行。我们首先为这些PDE构建非唯一的概率解，然后利用叠加原理获得相应DDSDE的非唯一鞅解。我们建立了关于稳态的两个主要非唯一性结果，分别在环面和全空间上，在相应的结构假设下成立。首先，我们构造一个无散度漂移项$v\in C_tL^{d-}$，使得DDSDE从稳态初始密度出发允许无穷多个不同的解。该结果位于自然的临界正则性阈值处：在若干模型中，$C_tL^{d+}$中的漂移项预期具有适定性。其次，对于$d\geq 3$及任意给定的$N\in\mathbb N$，我们构造一个无散度漂移项，使得DDSDE允许至少$N$个不同的稳态鞅解。由此产生的平衡态多重性使人联想到物理系统中的多稳态和相变现象。
AI.research_problem: 分布依赖随机微分方程（DDSDEs）在临界正则性条件下解的唯一性问题，特别是稳态解是否唯一。
AI.key_innovation: 在非线性Fokker--Planck方程层面构造非唯一概率解，再通过叠加原理获得DDSDE的非唯一鞅解；在临界正则性阈值$C_tL^{d-}$处构造无散度漂移项实现无穷多解或任意有限多解。
AI.motivation: 理解DDSDEs在临界正则性下的适定性边界，以及平衡态多重性与物理系统中多稳态和相变现象之间的联系。
AI.method: 在关联的非线性Fokker--Planck方程层面构造非唯一的概率解，利用叠加原理将其提升为DDSDE的鞅解；通过构造特定的无散度漂移项实现非唯一性。
AI.experiments: 理论构造而非数值实验：在环面和全空间上构造具体的无散度漂移项，证明DDSDE存在无穷多或任意给定有限多个不同的稳态鞅解。
AI.result: （1）在$C_tL^{d-}$临界正则性下，存在无散度漂移项使DDSDE从稳态初始密度出发有无穷多个不同解；（2）对$d\geq 3$，可构造漂移项使DDSDE有至少$N$个不同稳态鞅解。
AI.conclusion: DDSDEs在临界正则性阈值处存在非唯一性，稳态解的多重性反映了类似物理系统中多稳态和相变的现象。

title: Covariance-Regulated Recursive Koopman Learning for Nonlinear Systems with Uncertain Time-Varying Dynamics
summary: Offline models for autonomous robots often fail under time-varying dynamics outside their training distribution. Koopman operator theory offers a linear representation of nonlinear dynamics via lifting, but its transition to real-time recursive estimation may suffer numerical vulnerabilities: covariance windup under low excitation when using exponential forgetting, and vanishing gain without forgetting. This paper introduces a Covariance-Regulated Recursive Koopman Learning (CR-RKL) framework with two complementary strategies--error dead-zone gating and constant-trace normalization--each independently capable of preventing covariance explosion and parameter freezing, with the latter additionally preserving the geometric structure of uncertainty. Validated on a non-holonomic differential-drive robot with wheel slip and Stribeck friction and on a 26-gram butterfly-inspired flapping-wing micro aerial vehicle, CR-RKL achieves numerically stable and accurate online modeling, and when embedded in model predictive control, it maintains reliable tracking performance under uncertain, time-varying dynamics.

AI.tldr: 提出协方差正则化递归Koopman学习框架，解决时变动力学下在线建模的数值不稳定问题。
AI.translated_summary: 自主机器人的离线模型在训练分布之外的时变动力学条件下常常失效。Koopman算子理论通过提升（lifting）提供了非线性动力学的线性表示，但其在实时递归估计中的应用可能存在数值脆弱性：在使用指数遗忘时，低激励条件下会出现协方差发散（covariance windup）；而在不使用遗忘时则会出现增益消失。本文提出了一种协方差正则化递归Koopman学习（CR-RKL）框架，包含两种互补策略——误差死区门控（error dead-zone gating）和常迹归一化（constant-trace normalization）——每种策略均能独立防止协方差爆炸和参数冻结，其中后者还能额外保持不确定性的几何结构。该方法在存在车轮滑移和Stribeck摩擦的非完整差速驱动机器人以及26克仿蝴蝶扑翼微型飞行器上进行了验证，CR-RKL实现了数值稳定且精确的在线建模，并在嵌入模型预测控制后，在不确定的时变动力学条件下保持了可靠的跟踪性能。
AI.research_problem: Koopman算子理论在实时递归估计中存在数值脆弱性：使用指数遗忘时低激励下协方差发散，不使用遗忘时增益消失，导致在线建模不稳定。
AI.key_innovation: 提出CR-RKL框架，包含误差死区门控和常迹归一化两种互补策略，各自独立防止协方差爆炸与参数冻结，且常迹归一化还能保持不确定性的几何结构。
AI.motivation: 离线模型在训练分布外的时变动力学下失效，而Koopman算子虽能线性化非线性动力学，但其递归估计在实时应用中面临数值不稳定问题，亟需解决方案。
AI.method: 设计协方差正则化递归Koopman学习框架，采用误差死区门控与常迹归一化两种互补策略，分别应对低激励下的协方差发散和无遗忘时的增益消失问题。
AI.experiments: 在存在车轮滑移和Stribeck摩擦的非完整差速驱动机器人，以及26克仿蝴蝶扑翼微型飞行器两个平台上进行验证，并将CR-RKL嵌入模型预测控制中测试跟踪性能。
AI.result: CR-RKL在两个平台上均实现了数值稳定且精确的在线建模，嵌入模型预测控制后在不确定时变动力学条件下保持可靠跟踪。
AI.conclusion: CR-RKL框架有效解决了递归Koopman学习中的数值脆弱性问题，能够在时变不确定动力学条件下实现稳定的在线建模与控制。
